目录。\n\n   - 在 &#96;pubspec.yaml&#96; 中添加以下配置：\n\n     &#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\n     flutter:\n       fonts:\n         - family: SourceHanSans\n           fonts:\n             - asset: assets/fonts/SourceHanSansSC-Regular.otf\n     &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n   - 在应用的主题中指定该字体：\n\n     &#96;&#96;&#96;dart\n     MaterialApp(\n       theme: ThemeData(\n         fontFamily: 'SourceHanSans',\n       ),\n       // 其他配置...\n     )\n     &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n   这样，应用将使用指定的中文字体，避免乱码问题。\n\n2. **MQTT 消息格式化问题：**\n\n   为了确保发送和接收的 MQTT 消息以 JSON 格式处理，您需要在发送消息时将数据序列化为 JSON 格式，并在接收消息时进行反序列化。\n\n   **发送消息：**\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;dart\n   import 'dart:convert';\n\n   void sendMessage(MqttClient client, String topic, Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e message) {\n     final jsonString = jsonEncode(message);\n     final builder = MqttClientPayloadBuilder();\n     builder.addString(jsonString);\n     client.publishMessage(topic, MqttQos.atLeastOnce, builder.payload!);\n   }\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n\n   **接收消息：**\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;dart\n   client.updates!.listen((List\u003cMqttReceivedMessage\u003cMqttMessage\u003e\u003e c) {\n     final recMess = c[0].payload as MqttPublishMessage;\n     final messageString = MqttPublishPayload.bytesToStringAsString(recMess.payload.message);\n     try {\n       final message = jsonDecode(messageString);\n       // 处理 JSON 数据\n     } catch (e) {\n       // 处理非 JSON 格式的数据\n     }\n   });\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n\n   通过上述方法，确保 MQTT 消息以 JSON 格式进行发送和接收。\n\n3. **发送框尺寸问题：**\n\n   为了解决发送框过小导致长文本显示不全的问题，您可以使用 &#96;TextField&#96; 的 &#96;maxLines&#96; 属性设置其最大行数，并结合 &#96;Expanded&#96; 小部件使其在可用空间内扩展。\n\n   **示例：**\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;dart\n   Row(\n     children: [\n       Expanded(\n         child: TextField(\n           maxLines: null, // 允许多行输入\n           keyboardType: TextInputType.multiline,\n           decoration: InputDecoration(\n             hintText: '请输入消息',\n             border: OutlineInputBorder(),\n           ),\n         ),\n       ),\n       IconButton(\n         icon: Icon(Icons.send),\n         onPressed: () {\n           // 发送消息的逻辑\n         },\n       ),\n     ],\n   )\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n\n   这样，输入框会根据输入内容自动扩展，提升用户体验。\n\n4. **时间戳长度超出问题：**\n\n   如果消息的时间戳长度超出预期，可能是由于时间戳格式或显示方式导致的。请检查时间戳的生成和显示逻辑，确保其符合预期格式。\n\n   **建议：**\n\n   - 使用 &#96;DateTime&#96; 类生成时间戳，并格式化为易读的字符串：\n\n     &#96;&#96;&#96;dart\n     String formattedTime = DateFormat('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss').format(DateTime.now());\n     &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n   - 在显示时间戳的地方，确保有足够的空间容纳完整的时间字符串，避免因空间不足导致的显示问题。\n\n通过以上调整，您应该能够解决在真机测试中遇到的这些问题。 ",
      "title": "Web Search Results"
    }
  ]
}
```
User decision: **accepted**

Status: **completed**

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

## 已完成的修复

### 1. ✅ 中文乱码问题 - 添加编码格式选择
- 新增 `CharEncoding` 枚举（UTF-8, GBK, GB2312, ASCII）
- 添加 `fast_gbk` 包支持 GBK/GB2312 编码
- 所有页面（TCP Client、TCP Server、UDP、MQTT）都添加了编码选择器
- 发送和接收数据时使用选择的编码

### 2. ✅ 添加 JSON 数据格式支持
- `DataFormat` 枚举新增 `json` 选项
- 接收数据时自动格式化 JSON（带缩进显示）
- 发送时以 JSON 文本发送

### 3. ✅ 增大发送框高度
- 所有页面的发送框从 `maxLines: 1` 改为 `maxLines: 4, minLines: 1`
- MQTT 发布框改为 `maxLines: 6, minLines: 4`

### 4. ✅ MQTT 连接参数和 Topic 历史记录持久化
- 连接参数（服务器、端口、WebSocket设置等）自动保存和恢复
- Topic 历史记录持久化保存
- 订阅/发布 Topic 输入框旁添加历史记录下拉按钮

### 5. ✅ 修复 Row 溢出渲染问题
- 消息列表头部从 `Row` 改为 `Wrap`
- 时间戳和字节大小合并为一行显示
- 避免内容过长导致溢出

---

**新增功能界面说明：**

| 位置 | 新增控件 |
|------|---------|
| 格式选择区 | 编码下拉框（UTF-8/GBK/GB2312/ASCII） |
| 数据格式 | 新增 JSON 格式选项 |
| MQTT Topic 输入 | 历史记录按钮（📜图标） |
| 发送框 | 支持多行输入 |

应用正在构建中，请稍候测试。如果 GBK 编码仍有问题，可能需要确认对方设备的编码设置是否正确。

@@ -1,17 +1,112 @@
- # net_debug_tool
- 
- A new Flutter project.
- 
- ## Getting Started
- 
- This project is a starting point for a Flutter application.
- 
- A few resources to get you started if this is your first Flutter project:
- 
- - [Lab: Write your first Flutter app](https://docs.flutter.dev/get-started/codelab)
- - [Cookbook: Useful Flutter samples](https://docs.flutter.dev/cookbook)
- 
- For help getting started with Flutter development, view the
- [online documentation](https://docs.flutter.dev/), which offers tutorials,
- samples, guidance on mobile development, and a full API reference.
+ # 网络调试助手 (Network Debug Tool)
+ 
+ 一款基于 Flutter 开发的 Android 网络调试工具，支持 TCP Server、TCP Client、UDP、MQTT Client 四种通信模式，适用于嵌入式开发、物联网调试等场景。
+ 
+ ## ✨ 功能特性
+ 
+ ### 通信模式
+ - **TCP Server** - 支持多客户端连接（最多50个），可选择本机IP，支持单播/广播
+ - **TCP Client** - TCP 客户端连接，支持 Ping 测试
+ - **UDP** - UDP 通信，支持指定本地端口和目标地址
+ - **MQTT Client** - MQTT 3.1.1 协议，支持 WebSocket/WSS，订阅/发布消息
+ 
+ ### 数据格式
+ - 文本 (UTF-8)
+ - Hex (十六进制)
+ - Base64
+ - 二进制
+ - JSON (自动格式化)
+ 
+ ### 编码支持
+ - UTF-8
+ - GBK
+ - GB2312  
+ - ASCII
+ 
+ ### 其他功能
+ - 📊 实时统计：发送/接收字节数、包数、连接时长
+ - 📝 发送历史：保存最近10条发送记录，支持持久化
+ - 🔖 MQTT配置持久化：自动保存连接参数和Topic历史
+ - ⏸️ 暂停/继续接收数据
+ - 🌐 Ping 网络测试
+ - 🎨 消息区分：发送/接收消息颜色区分，带时间戳
+ - 📜 自动滚动：新消息自动滚动，手动滚动时暂停
+ 
+ ## 📱 截图
+ 
+ &lt;!-- 可添加应用截图 --&gt;
+ 
+ ## 🛠️ 开发环境
+ 
+ - Flutter SDK: ^3.10.3
+ - Dart SDK: ^3.10.3
+ - Android SDK: 36
+ - 目标平台: Android
+ 
+ ## 📦 依赖包
+ 
+ | 包名 | 版本 | 用途 |
+ |------|------|------|
+ | mqtt_client | ^10.6.0 | MQTT 客户端 |
+ | provider | ^6.1.1 | 状态管理 |
+ | shared_preferences | ^2.2.2 | 本地存储 |
+ | uuid | ^4.2.1 | UUID 生成 |
+ | fast_gbk | ^1.0.0 | GBK 编码支持 |
+ 
+ ## 🚀 快速开始
+ 
+ ### 1. 克隆项目
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;bash
+ git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/net_debug_tool.git
+ cd net_debug_tool
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ### 2. 获取依赖
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;bash
+ flutter pub get
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ### 3. 运行应用
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;bash
+ flutter run
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ### 4. 构建 APK
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;bash
+ flutter build apk --release
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ## 📋 使用说明
+ 
+ ### TCP Server
+ 1. 选择本机 IP 地址和端口
+ 2. 点击"启动服务器"
+ 3. 等待客户端连接
+ 4. 可选择单个客户端发送或广播
+ 
+ ### TCP Client
+ 1. 输入目标主机地址和端口
+ 2. 可先使用 Ping 测试连通性
+ 3. 点击"连接"建立连接
+ 4. 输入数据并发送
+ 
+ ### UDP
+ 1. 设置本地监听端口
+ 2. 设置目标地址和端口
+ 3. 点击"启动"
+ 4. 收发 UDP 数据报
+ 
+ ### MQTT Client
+ 1. 配置服务器地址、端口
+ 2. 可选配置 WebSocket、用户名密码
+ 3. 连接后在"订阅"页签添加订阅主题
+ 4. 在"发布"页签发送消息
+ 
+ ## 📄 License
+ 
+ MIT License
+ 
+ ## 🤝 贡献
+ 
+ 欢迎提交 Issue 和 Pull Request！
  
```

## 📋 Git 上传命令

在项目根目录（`D:\WorkSpace\Flutter_App\NetDebugTool\net_debug_tool`）执行：

```bash
# 1. 初始化 Git 仓库（如果还没初始化）
git init

# 2. 添加所有文件到暂存区
git add .

# 3. 首次提交
git commit -m "Initial commit: Flutter网络调试助手"

# 4. 设置主分支名称
git branch -M main

# 5. 添加远程仓库（替换为你的仓库地址）
git remote add origin https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/net_debug_tool.git

# 6. 推送到 GitHub
git push -u origin main
```

---

## 📝 GitHub 仓库描述 (Description)

复制以下内容到 GitHub 仓库的 Description 字段：

```
Flutter Android网络调试助手 | TCP Server/Client, UDP, MQTT Client | 支持Hex/JSON/GBK编码 | 嵌入式/物联网/MCU调试工具 | Network Debug Tool
```

---

## 🏷️ 推荐的 Topics 标签

在 GitHub 仓库设置中添加以下 Topics：

```
flutter, android, tcp, udp, mqtt, network-debug, iot, embedded, serial-communication, debug-tool, tcp-server, tcp-client, mqtt-client, gbk, hex, json, mcu
```

## 📁 .gitignore 排除的目录

已配置排除以下目录/文件：
- `.cursor/` - Cursor IDE 配置
- `.vscode/` - VS Code 配置
- `.idea/` - IntelliJ/Android Studio 配置
- `/build/` - 构建输出
- `.dart_tool/` - Dart 工具缓存
- `.pub-cache/` - Pub 缓存

你的代码和资源文件会正常上传，IDE 配置和构建产物会被排除。

## 💡 建议：永久配置环境变量

每次都要设置环境变量比较麻烦，建议添加到系统环境变量：

**方法 1：Windows 图形界面**
1. 右键 **此电脑** → **属性** → **高级系统设置**
2. 点击 **环境变量**
3. 在 **用户变量** 中点击 **新建**，分别添加：
   - 变量名: `PUB_HOSTED_URL`，值: `https://pub.flutter-io.cn`
   - 变量名: `FLUTTER_STORAGE_BASE_URL`，值: `https://storage.flutter-io.cn`
4. 点击确定，**重启终端**

**方法 2：PowerShell 命令（永久）**
```powershell
[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("PUB_HOSTED_URL", "https://pub.flutter-io.cn", "User")
[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("FLUTTER_STORAGE_BASE_URL", "https://storage.flutter-io.cn", "User")
```

设置后新开的终端就会自动使用国内镜像，不需要每次手动设置了。

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

Web 目录下的图标只影响 Web 平台，不影响 Android 应用图标。Android 图标需要单独设置。

## 方法一：使用 `flutter_launcher_icons`（推荐）

1. 在 `pubspec.yaml` 中添加配置：

```yaml
dev_dependencies:
  flutter_test:
    sdk: flutter
  flutter_lints: ^6.0.0
  flutter_launcher_icons: ^0.13.1  # 添加这一行

# 在文件末尾添加图标配置
flutter_launcher_icons:
  android: true
  ios: false
  image_path: "assets/icon/app_icon.png"  # 你的图标路径（1024x1024 或更大）
  adaptive_icon_background: "#FFFFFF"  # 可选：自适应图标背景色
  adaptive_icon_foreground: "assets/icon/app_icon.png"  # 可选：自适应图标前景
```

2. 准备一个源图标文件（建议 1024x1024 或更大），放到 `assets/icon/app_icon.png`（或你指定的路径）

3. 运行命令生成所有尺寸的图标：

```bash
flutter pub get
flutter pub run flutter_launcher_icons
```

## 方法二：手动替换（不推荐）

手动替换 `android/app/src/main/res/` 下各分辨率目录中的 `ic_launcher.png`：

- `mipmap-mdpi/ic_launcher.png` - 48x48 像素
- `mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher.png` - 72x72 像素
- `mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher.png` - 96x96 像素
- `mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher.png` - 144x144 像素
- `mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher.png` - 192x192 像素

## 关于 Web 图标

如果也要更新 Web 图标，需要替换 `web/icons/` 目录下的文件：
- `Icon-192.png` (192x192)
- `Icon-512.png` (512x512)
- `Icon-maskable-192.png` (192x192)
- `Icon-maskable-512.png` (512x512)

建议使用方法一，只需一个源图标即可自动生成所有尺寸。需要我帮你配置 `flutter_launcher_icons` 吗？

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking 2025-12-12 03:02:09Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user is having trouble pushing to their GitHub repository. Looking at the terminal output:

1. `git pull` was executed, and it fetched `origin/main` branch
2. But then it says "There is no tracking information for the current branch"
3. When trying to `git push -u origin main`, it was rejected because "the tip of your current branch is behind its remote counterpart"

This is a common issue when:
1. The user created a new repo on GitHub with some initial files (like LICENSE, README)
2. The local repo has different history (initialized locally)
3. Git refuses to merge unrelated histories

The solution is to either:
1. Force push (if the remote content is not important): `git push -u origin main --force`
2. Or pull with allow unrelated histories and then push: `git pull origin main --allow-unrelated-histories`

Since the user mentioned it's a new repo and from the GitHub page I can see it only has LICENSE and .gitignore files, the user probably created the repo with those initial files. The safest approach is to pull with `--allow-unrelated-histories` to merge the LICENSE file, then push.

Let me help them resolve this.</details></think>

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

问题原因是：你在 GitHub 上创建仓库时，选择了初始化 LICENSE 和 .gitignore 文件。这导致远程仓库有一个不同的初始提交历史，与本地仓库的历史不兼容。

从 [你的仓库](https://github.com/pixars-burger/NetDebugTools) 可以看到，远程已有 LICENSE 和 .gitignore 文件。

## 解决方案

**方案一：合并远程历史（推荐）**

```powershell
# 拉取远程分支并允许合并不相关的历史
git pull origin main --allow-unrelated-histories

# 然后推送
git push -u origin main
```

如果合并时出现冲突（比如 .gitignore），需要手动解决后再提交。

**方案二：强制推送（覆盖远程）**

如果你不需要远程仓库现有的 LICENSE 文件：

```powershell
git push -u origin main --force
```

⚠️ 这会覆盖远程仓库的所有内容，LICENSE 文件会丢失（但你可以之后再添加）。

---

你想用哪种方案？我帮你执行。如果选方案一，可能需要处理 .gitignore 冲突；如果选方案二，会直接覆盖远程。

---

_**User (2025-12-12 03:02:04Z)**_

我直接覆盖远程了，目前远程仓库没有LICESE文件了

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

版本号已配置为 `1.0.0+1`。打包 Release APK 的步骤：

## 打包 Release APK

### 1. 确保版本号正确
当前 `pubspec.yaml` 中版本号为 `1.0.0+1`，符合要求。

### 2. 执行打包命令

在项目根目录执行：

```powershell
# 设置 Flutter 镜像（如果需要）
$env:PUB_HOSTED_URL="https://pub.flutter-io.cn"
$env:FLUTTER_STORAGE_BASE_URL="https://storage.flutter-io.cn"

# 打包 Release APK
flutter build apk --release
```

### 3. 输出位置
打包完成后，APK 文件位于：
```
build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk
```

### 4. 可选：分架构打包
如果需要按架构分别打包（体积更小）：

```powershell
# 仅 ARM64（推荐，兼容大部分设备）
flutter build apk --release --split-per-abi

# 或者指定特定架构
flutter build apk --release --target-platform android-arm64
```

分架构打包后，会在以下目录生成多个 APK：
- `build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-armeabi-v7a-release.apk`
- `build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-arm64-v8a-release.apk`
- `build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-x86_64-release.apk`

### 5. 验证 APK
打包完成后，可以：
- 检查文件大小
- 安装到真机测试
- 上传到 GitHub Releases

### 注意事项
- 当前使用 debug 签名配置（`signingConfig = signingConfigs.getByName("debug")`），适合测试
- 如需发布到应用商店，需要配置 release 签名密钥

需要我帮你执行打包命令吗？切换到 agent 模式即可。

{
  "codeResults": [
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n      if (Platform.isAndroid || Platform.isLinux) {\r\n        // Android/Linux: ping -c count -W timeout host\r\n        result = await Process.run('ping', [\r\n          '-c',\r\n          count.toString(),\r\n          '-W',\r\n          timeout.toString(),\r\n          host,\r\n        ]);\r\n      } else if (Platform.isWindows) {\r\n        // Windows: ping -n count -w timeout*1000 host\r\n        result = await Process.run('ping', [\r\n          '-n',\r\n          count.toString(),\r\n          '-w',\r\n          (timeout * 1000).toString(),\r\n          host,\r\n        ]);\r\n      } else if (Platform.isIOS || Platform.isMacOS) {\r\n        // iOS/macOS: ping -c count -t timeout host\r\n        result = await Process.run('ping', [\r\n          '-c',\r\n          count.toString(),\r\n          '-t',\r\n          timeout.toString(),\r\n          host,\r\n        ]);\r\n      } else {\r\n        return PingResult.failure('不支持的平台');\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      final output = result.stdout.toString();\r\n      final exitCode = result.exitCode;\r\n\r\n      if (exitCode == 0) {\r\n        // 解析ping结果\r\n        return _parsePingOutput(output, host);\r\n      } else {\r\n        // Ping失败\r\n        final errorOutput = result.stderr.toString();\r\n        if (errorOutput.isNotEmpty) {\r\n          return PingResult.failure('Ping失败:       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import 'dart:io';\r\nimport '../utils/constants.dart';\r\n\r\n/// 网络工具服务\r\nclass NetworkToolService {\r\n  /// 获取本机所有可用的IPv4地址\r\n  static Future\u003cList\u003cNetworkInterfaceInfo\u003e\u003e getLocalIPs() async {\r\n    final result = \u003cNetworkInterfaceInfo\u003e[];\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      final interfaces = await NetworkInterface.list(\r\n        type: InternetAddressType.IPv4,\r\n        includeLinkLocal: false,\r\n        includeLoopback: false,\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      for (final interface in interfaces) {\r\n        for (final addr in interface.addresses) {\r\n          if (!addr.isLoopback \u0026\u0026 addr.type == InternetAddressType.IPv4) {\r\n            result.add(\r\n              NetworkInterfaceInfo(name: interface.name, address: addr.address),\r\n            );\r\n          }\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      // 获取失败时返回空列表\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // 如果没有找到任何IP，添加通配地址\r\n    if (result.isEmpty) {\r\n      result.add(NetworkInterfaceInfo(name: '所有接口', address: '0.0.0.0'));\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    return result;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 执行Ping操作\r\n  static Future\u003cPingResult\u003e ping(\r\n    String host, {\r\n    int count = AppConstants.pingCount,\r\n    int timeout = AppConstants.pingTimeout,\r\n  }) async {\r\n    try {\r\n      // 使用系统ping命令\r\n      final ProcessResult result;\r\n",

        "originalContents": "import 'dart:io';\r\nimport '../utils/constants.dart';\r\n\r\n/// 网络工具服务\r\nclass NetworkToolService {\r\n  /// 获取本机所有可用的IPv4地址\r\n  static Future\u003cList\u003cNetworkInterfaceInfo\u003e\u003e getLocalIPs() async {\r\n    final result = \u003cNetworkInterfaceInfo\u003e[];\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      final interfaces = await NetworkInterface.list(\r\n        type: InternetAddressType.IPv4,\r\n        includeLinkLocal: false,\r\n        includeLoopback: false,\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      for (final interface in interfaces) {\r\n        for (final addr in interface.addresses) {\r\n          if (!addr.isLoopback \u0026\u0026 addr.type == InternetAddressType.IPv4) {\r\n            result.add(\r\n              NetworkInterfaceInfo(name: interface.name, address: addr.address),\r\n            );\r\n          }\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      // 获取失败时返回空列表\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // 如果没有找到任何IP，添加通配地址\r\n    if (result.isEmpty) {\r\n      result.add(NetworkInterfaceInfo(name: '所有接口', address: '0.0.0.0'));\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    return result;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 执行Ping操作\r\n  static Future\u003cPingResult\u003e ping(\r\n    String host, {\r\n    int count = AppConstants.pingCount,\r\n    int timeout = AppConstants.pingTimeout,\r\n  }) async {\r\n    try {\r\n      // 使用系统ping命令\r\n      final ProcessResult result;\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import 'dart:async';\r\nimport 'dart:io';\r\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\r\nimport '../models/models.dart';\r\nimport '../utils/constants.dart';\r\n\r\n/// TCP客户端服务\r\nclass TcpClientService extends ChangeNotifier {\r\n  Socket? _socket;\r\n  ConnectionState _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n  final Statistics _statistics = Statistics();\r\n  final List\u003cMessageData\u003e _messages = [];\r\n  String? _errorMessage;\r\n  bool _isPaused = false;\r\n  StreamSubscription? _subscription;\r\n\r\n  String _host = '';\r\n  int _port = AppConstants.defaultTcpPort;\r\n\r\n  // Getters\r\n  ConnectionState get state =\u003e _state;\r\n  Statistics get statistics =\u003e _statistics;\r\n  List\u003cMessageData\u003e get messages =\u003e List.unmodifiable(_messages);\r\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e _errorMessage;\r\n  bool get isPaused =\u003e _isPaused;\r\n  bool get isConnected =\u003e _state == ConnectionState.connected;\r\n  String get host =\u003e _host;\r\n  int get port =\u003e _port;\r\n\r\n  /// 连接到服务器\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e connect(String host, int port) async {\r\n    if (_state == ConnectionState.connecting ||\r\n        _state == ConnectionState.connected) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    _host = host;\r\n    _port = port;\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.connecting;\r\n    _errorMessage = null;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      _socket = await Socket.connect(\r\n        host,\r\n        port,\r\n        timeout: const Duration(seconds: AppConstants.connectionTimeout),\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.connected;\r\n      _statistics.start();\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n\r\n      // 监听数据\r\n      _subscription = _socket!.listen(\r\n        _onData,\r\n        onError: _onError,\r\n        onDone: _onDone,\r\n        cancelOnError: false,\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.error;\r\n      _errorMessage = '连接失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": "import 'dart:async';\r\nimport 'dart:io';\r\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\r\nimport '../models/models.dart';\r\nimport '../utils/constants.dart';\r\n\r\n/// TCP客户端服务\r\nclass TcpClientService extends ChangeNotifier {\r\n  Socket? _socket;\r\n  ConnectionState _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n  final Statistics _statistics = Statistics();\r\n  final List\u003cMessageData\u003e _messages = [];\r\n  String? _errorMessage;\r\n  bool _isPaused = false;\r\n  StreamSubscription? _subscription;\r\n\r\n  String _host = '';\r\n  int _port = AppConstants.defaultTcpPort;\r\n\r\n  // Getters\r\n  ConnectionState get state =\u003e _state;\r\n  Statistics get statistics =\u003e _statistics;\r\n  List\u003cMessageData\u003e get messages =\u003e List.unmodifiable(_messages);\r\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e _errorMessage;\r\n  bool get isPaused =\u003e _isPaused;\r\n  bool get isConnected =\u003e _state == ConnectionState.connected;\r\n  String get host =\u003e _host;\r\n  int get port =\u003e _port;\r\n\r\n  /// 连接到服务器\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e connect(String host, int port) async {\r\n    if (_state == ConnectionState.connecting ||\r\n        _state == ConnectionState.connected) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    _host = host;\r\n    _port = port;\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.connecting;\r\n    _errorMessage = null;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      _socket = await Socket.connect(\r\n        host,\r\n        port,\r\n        timeout: const Duration(seconds: AppConstants.connectionTimeout),\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.connected;\r\n      _statistics.start();\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n\r\n      // 监听数据\r\n      _subscription = _socket!.listen(\r\n        _onData,\r\n        onError: _onError,\r\n        onDone: _onDone,\r\n        cancelOnError: false,\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.error;\r\n      _errorMessage = '连接失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n",

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 72

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import 'dart:async';\r\nimport 'dart:io';\r\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\r\nimport '../models/models.dart';\r\nimport '../utils/constants.dart';\r\n\r\n/// UDP服务\r\nclass UdpService extends ChangeNotifier {\r\n  RawDatagramSocket? _socket;\r\n  ConnectionState _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n  final Statistics _statistics = Statistics();\r\n  final List\u003cMessageData\u003e _messages = [];\r\n  String? _errorMessage;\r\n  bool _isPaused = false;\r\n\r\n  int _localPort = AppConstants.defaultUdpPort;\r\n  String _targetHost = '';\r\n  int _targetPort = AppConstants.defaultUdpPort;\r\n\r\n  // Getters\r\n  ConnectionState get state =\u003e _state;\r\n  Statistics get statistics =\u003e _statistics;\r\n  List\u003cMessageData\u003e get messages =\u003e List.unmodifiable(_messages);\r\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e _errorMessage;\r\n  bool get isPaused =\u003e _isPaused;\r\n  bool get isActive =\u003e _state == ConnectionState.connected;\r\n  int get localPort =\u003e _localPort;\r\n  String get targetHost =\u003e _targetHost;\r\n  int get targetPort =\u003e _targetPort;\r\n\r\n  /// 启动UDP监听\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e start(int localPort, String targetHost, int targetPort) async {\r\n    if (_state == ConnectionState.connecting ||\r\n        _state == ConnectionState.connected) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    _localPort = localPort;\r\n    _targetHost = targetHost;\r\n    _targetPort = targetPort;\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.connecting;\r\n    _errorMessage = null;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      _socket = await RawDatagramSocket.bind(\r\n        InternetAddress.anyIPv4,\r\n        localPort,\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.connected;\r\n      _statistics.start();\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n\r\n      // 监听数据\r\n      _socket!.listen(_onEvent, onError: _onError, onDone: _onDone);\r\n\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.error;\r\n      _errorMessage = '启动失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n",

        "originalContents": "import 'dart:async';\r\nimport 'dart:io';\r\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\r\nimport '../models/models.dart';\r\nimport '../utils/constants.dart';\r\n\r\n/// UDP服务\r\nclass UdpService extends ChangeNotifier {\r\n  RawDatagramSocket? _socket;\r\n  ConnectionState _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n  final Statistics _statistics = Statistics();\r\n  final List\u003cMessageData\u003e _messages = [];\r\n  String? _errorMessage;\r\n  bool _isPaused = false;\r\n\r\n  int _localPort = AppConstants.defaultUdpPort;\r\n  String _targetHost = '';\r\n  int _targetPort = AppConstants.defaultUdpPort;\r\n\r\n  // Getters\r\n  ConnectionState get state =\u003e _state;\r\n  Statistics get statistics =\u003e _statistics;\r\n  List\u003cMessageData\u003e get messages =\u003e List.unmodifiable(_messages);\r\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e _errorMessage;\r\n  bool get isPaused =\u003e _isPaused;\r\n  bool get isActive =\u003e _state == ConnectionState.connected;\r\n  int get localPort =\u003e _localPort;\r\n  String get targetHost =\u003e _targetHost;\r\n  int get targetPort =\u003e _targetPort;\r\n\r\n  /// 启动UDP监听\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e start(int localPort, String targetHost, int targetPort) async {\r\n    if (_state == ConnectionState.connecting ||\r\n        _state == ConnectionState.connected) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    _localPort = localPort;\r\n    _targetHost = targetHost;\r\n    _targetPort = targetPort;\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.connecting;\r\n    _errorMessage = null;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      _socket = await RawDatagramSocket.bind(\r\n        InternetAddress.anyIPv4,\r\n        localPort,\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.connected;\r\n      _statistics.start();\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n\r\n      // 监听数据\r\n      _socket!.listen(_onEvent, onError: _onError, onDone: _onDone);\r\n\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.error;\r\n      _errorMessage = '启动失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 68

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n  /// 停止UDP\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e stop() async {\r\n    _socket?.close();\r\n    _socket = null;\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 发送数据\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e send(Uint8List data, {String? host, int? port}) async {\r\n    if (!isActive || _socket == null) {\r\n      _errorMessage = 'UDP未启动';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    final targetHost = host ?? _targetHost;\r\n    final targetPort = port ?? _targetPort;\r\n\r\n    if (targetHost.isEmpty) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '请设置目标地址';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      final address = InternetAddress.tryParse(targetHost);\r\n      if (address == null) {\r\n        // 尝试解析域名\r\n        final addresses = await InternetAddress.lookup(targetHost);\r\n        if (addresses.isEmpty) {\r\n          _errorMessage = '无法解析地址: $targetHost';\r\n          notifyListeners();\r\n          return false;\r\n        }\r\n        final resolved = addresses.first;\r\n        _socket!.send(data, resolved, targetPort);\r\n      } else {\r\n        _socket!.send(data, address, targetPort);\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      _statistics.addSentData(data.length);\r\n\r\n      final message = MessageData(\r\n        id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n        data: data,\r\n        direction: MessageDirection.sent,\r\n        source: '$targetHost:$targetPort',\r\n      );\r\n      _addMessage(message);\r\n\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '发送失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理Socket事件\r\n  void _onEvent(RawSocketEvent event) {\r\n    if (event == RawSocketEvent.read) {\r\n      final datagram = _socket?.receive();\r\n      if (datagram != null \u0026\u0026 !_isPaused) {\r\n        _statistics.addReceivedData(datagram.data.length);\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [

            "text": "      return false;\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 65,

            "text": "  }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "  /// 停止UDP\r"

            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "          "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n  /// 停止UDP\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e stop() async {\r\n    _socket?.close();\r\n    _socket = null;\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 发送数据\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e send(Uint8List data, {String? host, int? port}) async {\r\n    if (!isActive || _socket == null) {\r\n      _errorMessage = 'UDP未启动';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    final targetHost = host ?? _targetHost;\r\n    final targetPort = port ?? _targetPort;\r\n\r\n    if (targetHost.isEmpty) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '请设置目标地址';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      final address = InternetAddress.tryParse(targetHost);\r\n      if (address == null) {\r\n        // 尝试解析域名\r\n        final addresses = await InternetAddress.lookup(targetHost);\r\n        if (addresses.isEmpty) {\r\n          _errorMessage = '无法解析地址: $targetHost';\r\n          notifyListeners();\r\n          return false;\r\n        }\r\n        final resolved = addresses.first;\r\n        _socket!.send(data, resolved, targetPort);\r\n      } else {\r\n        _socket!.send(data, address, targetPort);\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      _statistics.addSentData(data.length);\r\n\r\n      final message = MessageData(\r\n        id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n        data: data,\r\n        direction: MessageDirection.sent,\r\n        source: '$targetHost:$targetPort',\r\n      );\r\n      _addMessage(message);\r\n\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '发送失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理Socket事件\r\n  void _onEvent(RawSocketEvent event) {\r\n    if (event == RawSocketEvent.read) {\r\n      final datagram = _socket?.receive();\r\n      if (datagram != null \u0026\u0026 !_isPaused) {\r\n        _statistics.addReceivedData(datagram.data.length);\r\n",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n  /// 处理新客户端连接\r\n  void _onClientConnect(Socket socket) {\r\n    if (_clients.length \u003e= AppConstants.maxTcpClients) {\r\n      socket.close();\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    final id =\r\n        '${socket.remoteAddress.address}:${socket.remotePort}_${DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch}';\r\n    final client = TcpClientInfo(\r\n      id: id,\r\n      socket: socket,\r\n      address: socket.remoteAddress.address,\r\n      port: socket.remotePort,\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    _clients[id] = client;\r\n\r\n    // 监听客户端数据\r\n    client.subscription = socket.listen(\r\n      (data) =\u003e _onClientData(id, Uint8List.fromList(data)),\r\n      onError: (error) =\u003e _onClientError(id, error),\r\n      onDone: () =\u003e _onClientDone(id),\r\n      cancelOnError: false,\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理客户端数据\r\n  void _onClientData(String clientId, Uint8List data) {\r\n    if (_isPaused) return;\r\n\r\n    final client = _clients[clientId];\r\n    if (client == null) return;\r\n\r\n    client.statistics.addReceivedData(data.length);\r\n    _statistics.addReceivedData(data.length);\r\n\r\n    final message = MessageData(\r\n      id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n      data: data,\r\n      direction: MessageDirection.received,\r\n      source: client.displayAddress,\r\n    );\r\n    _addMessage(message);\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理客户端错误\r\n  void _onClientError(String clientId, dynamic error) {\r\n    _disconnectClient(clientId, addToHistory: true);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理客户端断开\r\n  void _onClientDone(String clientId) {\r\n    _disconnectClient(clientId, addToHistory: true);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 断开指定客户端\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _disconnectClient(\r\n    String clientId, {\r\n    bool addToHistory = false,\r\n  }) async {\r\n    final client = _clients.remove(clientId);\r\n    if (client == null) return;\r\n\r\n    await client.subscription?.cancel();\r\n    try {\r\n      await client.socket.close();\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      // 忽略关闭错误\r\n    }\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n  /// 处理新客户端连接\r\n  void _onClientConnect(Socket socket) {\r\n    if (_clients.length \u003e= AppConstants.maxTcpClients) {\r\n      socket.close();\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    final id =\r\n        '${socket.remoteAddress.address}:${socket.remotePort}_${DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch}';\r\n    final client = TcpClientInfo(\r\n      id: id,\r\n      socket: socket,\r\n      address: socket.remoteAddress.address,\r\n      port: socket.remotePort,\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    _clients[id] = client;\r\n\r\n    // 监听客户端数据\r\n    client.subscription = socket.listen(\r\n      (data) =\u003e _onClientData(id, Uint8List.fromList(data)),\r\n      onError: (error) =\u003e _onClientError(id, error),\r\n      onDone: () =\u003e _onClientDone(id),\r\n      cancelOnError: false,\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理客户端数据\r\n  void _onClientData(String clientId, Uint8List data) {\r\n    if (_isPaused) return;\r\n\r\n    final client = _clients[clientId];\r\n    if (client == null) return;\r\n\r\n    client.statistics.addReceivedData(data.length);\r\n    _statistics.addReceivedData(data.length);\r\n\r\n    final message = MessageData(\r\n      id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n      data: data,\r\n      direction: MessageDirection.received,\r\n      source: client.displayAddress,\r\n    );\r\n    _addMessage(message);\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理客户端错误\r\n  void _onClientError(String clientId, dynamic error) {\r\n    _disconnectClient(clientId, addToHistory: true);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理客户端断开\r\n  void _onClientDone(String clientId) {\r\n    _disconnectClient(clientId, addToHistory: true);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 断开指定客户端\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _disconnectClient(\r\n    String clientId, {\r\n    bool addToHistory = false,\r\n  }) async {\r\n    final client = _clients.remove(clientId);\r\n    if (client == null) return;\r\n\r\n    await client.subscription?.cancel();\r\n    try {\r\n      await client.socket.close();\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      //     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/// 应用常量定义\r\nclass AppConstants {\r\n  // 应用信息\r\n  static const String appName = '网络调试助手';\r\n  static const String appVersion = '1.0.0';\r\n\r\n  // 网络配置\r\n  static const int defaultTcpPort = 8080;\r\n  static const int defaultUdpPort = 8081;\r\n  static const int defaultMqttPort = 1883;\r\n  static const int defaultMqttWsPort = 8083;\r\n  static const int defaultMqttWssPort = 8084;\r\n\r\n  static const int minPort = 1024;\r\n  static const int maxPort = 65535;\r\n\r\n  // 连接配置\r\n  static const int connectionTimeout = 10; // 秒\r\n  static const int receiveTimeout = 30; // 秒\r\n  static const int bufferSize = 4096; // 字节\r\n\r\n  // Ping配置\r\n  static const int pingCount = 3;\r\n  static const int pingTimeout = 6; // 秒\r\n\r\n  // MQTT配置\r\n  static const int mqttKeepAlive = 60; // 秒\r\n  static const String defaultMqttWsPath = '/mqtt';\r\n\r\n  // 历史记录配置\r\n  static const int maxSendHistory = 10;\r\n  static const int maxConnectionHistory = 100;\r\n  static const int maxMessageHistory = 1000;\r\n\r\n  // 客户端限制\r\n  static const int maxTcpClients = 50;\r\n\r\n  // SharedPreferences键\r\n  static const String prefTcpClientHistory = 'tcp_client_send_history';\r\n  static const String prefTcpServerHistory = 'tcp_server_send_history';\r\n  static const String prefUdpHistory = 'udp_send_history';\r\n  static const String prefMqttHistory = 'mqtt_send_history';\r\n\r\n  // MQTT配置持久化键\r\n  static const String prefMqttHost = 'mqtt_host';\r\n  static const String prefMqttPort = 'mqtt_port';\r\n  static const String prefMqttUsername = 'mqtt_username';\r\n  static const String prefMqttUseWebSocket = 'mqtt_use_websocket';\r\n  static const String prefMqttUseWss = 'mqtt_use_wss';\r\n  static const String prefMqttWsPath = 'mqtt_ws_path';\r\n  static const String prefMqttTopicHistory = 'mqtt_topic_history';\r\n  static const String prefMqttLastSubTopic = 'mqtt_last_sub_topic';\r\n  static const String prefMqttLastPubTopic = 'mqtt_last_pub_topic';\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// 连接状态\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "/// 应用常量定义\r"

            "text": "  static const String appName = '网络调试助手';\r"

            "text": "  static const String appVersion = '1.0.0';\r"

        ],
        "originalContents": "/// 应用常量定义\r\nclass AppConstants {\r\n  // 应用信息\r\n  static const String appName = '网络调试助手';\r\n  static const String appVersion = '1.0.0';\r\n\r\n  // 网络配置\r\n  static const int defaultTcpPort = 8080;\r\n  static const int defaultUdpPort = 8081;\r\n  static const int defaultMqttPort = 1883;\r\n  static const int defaultMqttWsPort = 8083;\r\n  static const int defaultMqttWssPort = 8084;\r\n\r\n  static const int minPort = 1024;\r\n  static const int maxPort = 65535;\r\n\r\n  // 连接配置\r\n  static const int connectionTimeout = 10; // 秒\r\n  static const int receiveTimeout = 30; // 秒\r\n  static const int bufferSize = 4096; // 字节\r\n\r\n  // Ping配置\r\n  static const int pingCount = 3;\r\n  static const int pingTimeout = 6; // 秒\r\n\r\n  // MQTT配置\r\n  static const int mqttKeepAlive = 60; // 秒\r\n  static const String defaultMqttWsPath = '/mqtt';\r\n\r\n  // 历史记录配置\r\n  static const int maxSendHistory = 10;\r\n  static const int maxConnectionHistory = 100;\r\n  static const int maxMessageHistory = 1000;\r\n\r\n  // 客户端限制\r\n  static const int maxTcpClients = 50;\r\n\r\n  // SharedPreferences键\r\n  static const String prefTcpClientHistory = 'tcp_client_send_history';\r\n  static const String prefTcpServerHistory = 'tcp_server_send_history';\r\n  static const String prefUdpHistory = 'udp_send_history';\r\n  static const String prefMqttHistory = 'mqtt_send_history';\r\n\r\n  // MQTT配置持久化键\r\n  static const String prefMqttHost = 'mqtt_host';\r\n  static const String prefMqttPort = 'mqtt_port';\r\n  static const String prefMqttUsername = 'mqtt_username';\r\n  static const String prefMqttUseWebSocket = 'mqtt_use_websocket';\r\n  static const String prefMqttUseWss = 'mqtt_use_wss';\r\n  static const String prefMqttWsPath = 'mqtt_ws_path';\r\n  static const String prefMqttTopicHistory = 'mqtt_topic_history';\r\n  static const String prefMqttLastSubTopic = 'mqtt_last_sub_topic';\r\n  static const String prefMqttLastPubTopic = 'mqtt_last_pub_topic';\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// 连接状态\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 58
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "lib/utils/constants.dart"
      },
      "score": 0.2837130129337311
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n  /// 断开连接\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e disconnect() async {\r\n    await _subscription?.cancel();\r\n    _subscription = null;\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      await _socket?.close();\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      // 忽略关闭错误\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    _socket = null;\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 发送数据\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e send(Uint8List data) async {\r\n    if (!isConnected || _socket == null) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '未连接到服务器';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      _socket!.add(data);\r\n      await _socket!.flush();\r\n\r\n      _statistics.addSentData(data.length);\r\n\r\n      final message = MessageData(\r\n        id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n        data: data,\r\n        direction: MessageDirection.sent,\r\n      );\r\n      _addMessage(message);\r\n\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '发送失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理接收数据\r\n  void _onData(Uint8List data) {\r\n    if (_isPaused) return;\r\n\r\n    _statistics.addReceivedData(data.length);\r\n\r\n    final message = MessageData(\r\n      id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n      data: data,\r\n      direction: MessageDirection.received,\r\n    );\r\n    _addMessage(message);\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理错误\r\n  void _onError(dynamic error) {\r\n    _errorMessage = '连接错误: $error';\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.error;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理连接关闭\r\n  void _onDone() {\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n    _socket = null;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 添加消息（限制数量）\r\n  void _addMessage(MessageData message) {\r\n    _messages.add(message);\r\n    if (_messages.length \u003e AppConstants.maxMessageHistory) {\r\n      _messages.removeAt(0);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "#include \"utils.h\"\r\n\r\n#include \u003cflutter_windows.h\u003e\r\n#include \u003cio.h\u003e\r\n#include \u003cstdio.h\u003e\r\n#include \u003cwindows.h\u003e\r\n\r\n#include \u003ciostream\u003e\r\n\r\nvoid CreateAndAttachConsole() {\r\n  if (::AllocConsole()) {\r\n    FILE *unused;\r\n    if (freopen_s(\u0026unused, \"CONOUT$\", \"w\", stdout)) {\r\n      _dup2(_fileno(stdout), 1);\r\n    }\r\n    if (freopen_s(\u0026unused, \"CONOUT$\", \"w\", stderr)) {\r\n      _dup2(_fileno(stdout), 2);\r\n    }\r\n    std::ios::sync_with_stdio();\r\n    FlutterDesktopResyncOutputStreams();\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nstd::vector\u003cstd::string\u003e GetCommandLineArguments() {\r\n  // Convert the UTF-16 command line arguments to UTF-8 for the Engine to use.\r\n  int argc;\r\n  wchar_t** argv = ::CommandLineToArgvW(::GetCommandLineW(), \u0026argc);\r\n  if (argv == nullptr) {\r\n    return std::vector\u003cstd::string\u003e();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  std::vector\u003cstd::string\u003e command_line_arguments;\r\n\r\n  // Skip the first argument as it's the binary name.\r\n  for (int i = 1; i \u003c argc; i++) {\r\n    command_line_arguments.push_back(Utf8FromUtf16(argv[i]));\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  ::LocalFree(argv);\r\n\r\n  return command_line_arguments;\r\n}\r\n\r\nstd::string Utf8FromUtf16(const wchar_t* utf16_string) {\r\n  if (utf16_string == nullptr) {\r\n    return std::string();\r\n  }\r\n  unsigned int target_length = ::WideCharToMultiByte(\r\n      CP_UTF8, WC_ERR_INVALID_CHARS, utf16_string,\r\n      -1, nullptr, 0, nullptr, nullptr)\r\n    -1; // remove the trailing null character\r\n  int input_length = (int)wcslen(utf16_string);\r\n  std::string utf8_string;\r\n  if (target_length == 0 || target_length \u003e utf8_string.max_size()) {\r\n    return utf8_string;\r\n  }\r\n  utf8_string.resize(target_length);\r\n  int converted_length = ::WideCharToMultiByte(\r\n      CP_UTF8, WC_ERR_INVALID_CHARS, utf16_string,\r\n      input_length, utf8_string.data(), target_length, nullptr, nullptr);\r\n  if (converted_length == 0) {\r\n    return std::string();\r\n  }\r\n  return utf8_string;\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "#include \"utils.h\"\r\n\r\n#include \u003cflutter_windows.h\u003e\r\n#include \u003cio.h\u003e\r\n#include \u003cstdio.h\u003e\r\n#include \u003cwindows.h\u003e\r\n\r\n#include \u003ciostream\u003e\r\n\r\nvoid CreateAndAttachConsole() {\r\n  if (::AllocConsole()) {\r\n    FILE *unused;\r\n    if (freopen_s(\u0026unused, \"CONOUT$\", \"w\", stdout)) {\r\n      _dup2(_fileno(stdout), 1);\r\n    }\r\n    if (freopen_s(\u0026unused, \"CONOUT$\", \"w\", stderr)) {\r\n      _dup2(_fileno(stdout), 2);\r\n    }\r\n    std::ios::sync_with_stdio();\r\n    FlutterDesktopResyncOutputStreams();\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nstd::vector\u003cstd::string\u003e GetCommandLineArguments() {\r\n  // Convert the UTF-16 command line arguments to UTF-8 for the Engine to use.\r\n  int argc;\r\n  wchar_t** argv = ::CommandLineToArgvW(::GetCommandLineW(), \u0026argc);\r\n  if (argv == nullptr) {\r\n    return std::vector\u003cstd::string\u003e();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  std::vector\u003cstd::string\u003e command_line_arguments;\r\n\r\n  // Skip the first argument as it's the binary name.\r\n  for (int i = 1; i \u003c argc; i++) {\r\n    command_line_arguments.push_back(Utf8FromUtf16(argv[i]));\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  ::LocalFree(argv);\r\n\r\n  return command_line_arguments;\r\n}\r\n\r\nstd::string Utf8FromUtf16(const wchar_t* utf16_string) {\r\n  if (utf16_string == nullptr) {\r\n    return std::string();\r\n  }\r\n  unsigned int target_length = ::WideCharToMultiByte(\r\n      CP_UTF8, WC_ERR_INVALID_CHARS, utf16_string,\r\n      -1, nullptr, 0, nullptr, nullptr)\r\n    -1; // remove the trailing null character\r\n  int input_length = (int)wcslen(utf16_string);\r\n  std::string utf8_string;\r\n  if (target_length == 0 || target_length \u003e utf8_string.max_size()) {\r\n    return utf8_string;\r\n  }\r\n  utf8_string.resize(target_length);\r\n  int converted_length = ::WideCharToMultiByte(\r\n      CP_UTF8, WC_ERR_INVALID_CHARS, utf16_string,\r\n      input_length, utf8_string.data(), target_length, nullptr, nullptr);\r\n  if (converted_length == 0) {\r\n    return std::string();\r\n  }\r\n  return utf8_string;\r\n}",

        "relativeWorkspacePath": "windows/runner/utils.cpp"

      "score": 0.2798672914505005

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# 网络调试助手 (Network Debug Tool)\r\n\r\n一款基于 Flutter 开发的 Android 网络调试工具，支持 TCP Server、TCP Client、UDP、MQTT Client 四种通信模式，适用于嵌入式开发、物联网调试等场景。\r\n\r\n### 功能特性\r\n\r\n#### 通信模式\r\n- **TCP Server** - 支持多客户端连接（最多50个），可选择本机IP，支持单播/广播\r\n- **TCP Client** - TCP 客户端连接，支持 Ping 测试\r\n- **UDP** - UDP 通信，支持指定本地端口和目标地址\r\n- **MQTT Client** - MQTT 3.1.1 协议，支持 WebSocket/WSS，订阅/发布消息\r\n\r\n#### 数据格式\r\n- 文本 (UTF-8)\r\n- Hex (十六进制)\r\n- Base64\r\n- 二进制\r\n- JSON (自动格式化)\r\n\r\n#### 编码支持\r\n- UTF-8\r\n- GBK\r\n- GB2312  \r\n- ASCII\r\n\r\n#### 其他功能\r\n- 实时统计：发送/接收字节数、包数、连接时长\r\n- 发送历史：保存最近10条发送记录，支持持久化\r\n- MQTT配置持久化：自动保存连接参数和Topic历史\r\n- 暂停/继续接收数据\r\n- Ping 网络测试\r\n- 消息区分：发送/接收消息颜色区分，带时间戳\r\n- 自动滚动：新消息自动滚动，手动滚动时暂停\r\n\r\n### 截图\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- 可添加应用截图 --\u003e\r\n\r\n### 开发环境\r\n\r\n- Flutter SDK: ^3.10.3\r\n- Dart SDK: ^3.10.3\r\n- Android SDK: 36\r\n- 目标平台: Android\r\n\r\n### 依赖包\r\n\r\n| 包名 | 版本 | 用途 |\r\n|------|------|------|\r\n| mqtt_client | ^10.6.0 | MQTT 客户端 |\r\n| provider | ^6.1.1 | 状态管理 |\r\n| shared_preferences | ^2.2.2 | 本地存储 |\r\n| uuid | ^4.2.1 | UUID 生成 |\r\n| fast_gbk | ^1.0.0 | GBK 编码支持 |\r\n\r\n### 快速开始\r\n\r\n#### 1. 克隆项目\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\ngit clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/net_debug_tool.git\r\ncd net_debug_tool\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n#### 2. 获取依赖\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nflutter pub get\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n#### 3. 运行应用\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nflutter run\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n#### 4. 构建 APK\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nflutter build apk --release\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 使用说明\r\n\r\n#### TCP Server\r\n1. 选择本机 IP 地址和端口\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 网络调试助手 (Network Debug Tool)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "一款基于 Flutter 开发的 Android 网络调试工具，支持 TCP Server、TCP Client、UDP、MQTT Client 四种通信模式，适用于嵌入式开发、物联网调试等场景。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "### 功能特性\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "#### 通信模式\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "- **TCP Server** - 支持多客户端连接（最多50个），可选择本机IP，支持单播/广播\r"

          {

            "text": "- **TCP Client** - TCP 客户端连接，支持 Ping 测试\r"

          {

            "text": "- **UDP** - UDP 通信，支持指定本地端口和目标地址\r"
          },
          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "### 快速开始\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "#### 1. 克隆项目\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/net_debug_tool.git\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "cd net_debug_tool\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "#### 2. 获取依赖\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "flutter pub get\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "#### 3. 运行应用\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "flutter run\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "#### 4. 构建 APK\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "flutter build apk --release\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "### 使用说明\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "#### TCP Server\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "1. 选择本机 IP 地址和端口\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "2. 点击\"启动服务器\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "3. 等待客户端连接\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# 网络调试助手 (Network Debug Tool)\r\n\r\n一款基于 Flutter 开发的 Android 网络调试工具，支持 TCP Server、TCP Client、UDP、MQTT Client 四种通信模式，适用于嵌入式开发、物联网调试等场景。\r\n\r\n### 功能特性\r\n\r\n#### 通信模式\r\n- **TCP Server** - 支持多客户端连接（最多50个），可选择本机IP，支持单播/广播\r\n- **TCP Client** - TCP 客户端连接，支持 Ping 测试\r\n- **UDP** - UDP 通信，支持指定本地端口和目标地址\r\n- **MQTT Client** - MQTT 3.1.1 协议，支持 WebSocket/WSS，订阅/发布消息\r\n\r\n#### 数据格式\r\n- 文本 (UTF-8)\r\n- Hex (十六进制)\r\n- Base64\r\n- 二进制\r\n- JSON (自动格式化)\r\n\r\n#### 编码支持\r\n- UTF-8\r\n- GBK\r\n- GB2312  \r\n- ASCII\r\n\r\n#### 其他功能\r\n- 实时统计：发送/接收字节数、包数、连接时长\r\n- 发送历史：保存最近10条发送记录，支持持久化\r\n- MQTT配置持久化：自动保存连接参数和Topic历史\r\n- 暂停/继续接收数据\r\n- Ping 网络测试\r\n- 消息区分：发送/接收消息颜色区分，带时间戳\r\n- 自动滚动：新消息自动滚动，手动滚动时暂停\r\n\r\n### 截图\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- 可添加应用截图 --\u003e\r\n\r\n### 开发环境\r\n\r\n- Flutter SDK: ^3.10.3\r\n- Dart SDK: ^3.10.3\r\n- Android SDK: 36\r\n- 目标平台: Android\r\n\r\n### 依赖包\r\n\r\n| 包名 | 版本 | 用途 |\r\n|------|------|------|\r\n| mqtt_client | ^10.6.0 | MQTT 客户端 |\r\n| provider | ^6.1.1 | 状态管理 |\r\n| shared_preferences | ^2.2.2 | 本地存储 |\r\n| uuid | ^4.2.1 | UUID 生成 |\r\n| fast_gbk | ^1.0.0 | GBK 编码支持 |\r\n\r\n### 快速开始\r\n\r\n#### 1. 克隆项目\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\ngit clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/net_debug_tool.git\r\ncd net_debug_tool\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n#### 2. 获取依赖\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nflutter pub get\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n#### 3. 运行应用\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nflutter run\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n#### 4. 构建 APK\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nflutter build apk --release\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 使用说明\r\n\r\n#### TCP Server\r\n1. 选择本机 IP 地址和端口\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 84
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "README.md"
      },
      "score": 0.27281761169433594
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n      for (final match in matches) {\r\n        final timeStr = match.group(1);\r\n        if (timeStr != null) {\r\n          times.add(double.parse(timeStr));\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      if (times.isEmpty) {\r\n        // 尝试Windows中文格式\r\n        final cnTimeRegex = RegExp(r'时间[=\u003c]?(\\d+)\\s*ms', caseSensitive: false);\r\n        final cnMatches = cnTimeRegex.allMatches(output);\r\n        for (final match in cnMatches) {\r\n          final timeStr = match.group(1);\r\n          if (timeStr != null) {\r\n            times.add(double.parse(timeStr));\r\n          }\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      // 解析丢包率\r\n      int packetLoss = 0;\r\n      final lossRegex = RegExp(\r\n        r'(\\d+)%\\s*(packet\\s*)?loss',\r\n        caseSensitive: false,\r\n      );\r\n      final lossMatch = lossRegex.firstMatch(output);\r\n      if (lossMatch != null) {\r\n        packetLoss = int.parse(lossMatch.group(1)!);\r\n      } else {\r\n        // 尝试中文格式\r\n        final cnLossRegex = RegExp(r'丢失\\s*=\\s*(\\d+)');\r\n        final cnLossMatch = cnLossRegex.firstMatch(output);\r\n        if (cnLossMatch != null) {\r\n          final sent = RegExp(r'已发送\\s*=\\s*(\\d+)').firstMatch(output);\r\n          final lost = int.parse(cnLossMatch.group(1)!);\r\n          if (sent != null) {\r\n            final sentCount = int.parse(sent.group(1)!);\r\n            packetLoss = (lost * 100 / sentCount).round();\r\n          }\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      if (times.isNotEmpty) {\r\n        final avgTime = times.reduce((a, b) =\u003e a + b) / times.length;\r\n        final minTime = times.reduce((a, b) =\u003e a \u003c b ? a : b);\r\n        final maxTime = times.reduce((a, b) =\u003e a \u003e b ? a : b);\r\n\r\n        return PingResult.success(\r\n          host: host,\r\n          avgTime: avgTime,\r\n          minTime: minTime,\r\n          maxTime: maxTime,\r\n          packetLoss: packetLoss,\r\n          received: times.length,\r\n          rawOutput: output,\r\n        );\r\n      ",

a : b);\r\n        final maxTime = times.reduce((a, b) =\u003e a \u003e b ? a : b);\r\n\r\n        return PingResult.success(\r\n          host: host,\r\n          avgTime: avgTime,\r\n          minTime: minTime,\r\n          maxTime: maxTime,\r\n          packetLoss: packetLoss,\r\n          received: times.length,\r\n          rawOutput: output,\r\n        );\r\n      ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n  // Getters\r\n  ServerState get state =\u003e _state;\r\n  Map\u003cString, TcpClientInfo\u003e get clients =\u003e Map.unmodifiable(_clients);\r\n  List\u003cTcpClientInfo\u003e get clientList =\u003e _clients.values.toList();\r\n  List\u003cConnectionInfo\u003e get connectionHistory =\u003e\r\n      List.unmodifiable(_connectionHistory);\r\n  List\u003cMessageData\u003e get messages =\u003e List.unmodifiable(_messages);\r\n  Statistics get statistics =\u003e _statistics;\r\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e _errorMessage;\r\n  bool get isPaused =\u003e _isPaused;\r\n  bool get isRunning =\u003e _state == ServerState.running;\r\n  String get bindAddress =\u003e _bindAddress;\r\n  int get port =\u003e _port;\r\n  int get clientCount =\u003e _clients.length;\r\n\r\n  /// 启动服务器\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e start(String address, int port) async {\r\n    if (_state == ServerState.starting || _state == ServerState.running) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    _bindAddress = address;\r\n    _port = port;\r\n    _state = ServerState.starting;\r\n    _errorMessage = null;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      _serverSocket = await ServerSocket.bind(address, port, shared: false);\r\n\r\n      _state = ServerState.running;\r\n      _statistics.start();\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n\r\n      // 监听连接\r\n      _serverSocket!.listen(\r\n        _onClientConnect,\r\n        onError: _onServerError,\r\n        onDone: _onServerDone,\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _state = ServerState.error;\r\n      _errorMessage = '启动服务器失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 停止服务器\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e stop() async {\r\n    // 断开所有客户端\r\n    for (final client in _clients.values.toList()) {\r\n      await _disconnectClient(client.id, addToHistory: true);\r\n    }\r\n    _clients.clear();\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      await _serverSocket?.close();\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      // 忽略关闭错误\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    _serverSocket = null;\r\n    _state = ServerState.stopped;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "  int _port = AppConstants.defaultTcpPort;\r"

            "text": "  /// 停止服务器\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "  Future\u003cvoid\u003e stop() async {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    // 断开所有客户端\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "    for (final client in _clients.values.toList()) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "      await _disconnectClient(client.id, addToHistory: true);\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 110,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,

            "lineNumber": 112,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "      await _serverSocket?.close();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "    } catch (e) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "      // 忽略关闭错误\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    }\r"

            "lineNumber": 118,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "    _serverSocket = null;\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "  /// 处理新客户端连接\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n  // Getters\r\n  ServerState get state =\u003e _state;\r\n  Map\u003cString, TcpClientInfo\u003e get clients =\u003e Map.unmodifiable(_clients);\r\n  List\u003cTcpClientInfo\u003e get clientList =\u003e _clients.values.toList();\r\n  List\u003cConnectionInfo\u003e get connectionHistory =\u003e\r\n      List.unmodifiable(_connectionHistory);\r\n  List\u003cMessageData\u003e get messages =\u003e List.unmodifiable(_messages);\r\n  Statistics get statistics =\u003e _statistics;\r\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e _errorMessage;\r\n  bool get isPaused =\u003e _isPaused;\r\n  bool get isRunning =\u003e _state == ServerState.running;\r\n  String get bindAddress =\u003e _bindAddress;\r\n  int get port =\u003e _port;\r\n  int get clientCount =\u003e _clients.length;\r\n\r\n  /// 启动服务器\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e start(String address, int port) async {\r\n    if (_state == ServerState.starting || _state == ServerState.running) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    _bindAddress = address;\r\n    _port = port;\r\n    _state = ServerState.starting;\r\n    _errorMessage = null;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      _serverSocket = await ServerSocket.bind(address, port, shared: false);\r\n\r\n      _state = ServerState.running;\r\n      _statistics.start();\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n\r\n      // 监听连接\r\n      _serverSocket!.listen(\r\n        _onClientConnect,\r\n        onError: _onServerError,\r\n        onDone: _onServerDone,\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _state = ServerState.error;\r\n      _errorMessage = '启动服务器失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 停止服务器\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e stop() async {\r\n    // 断开所有客户端\r\n    for (final client in _clients.values.toList()) {\r\n      await _disconnectClient(client.id, addToHistory: true);\r\n    }\r\n    _clients.clear();\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      await _serverSocket?.close();\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      // 忽略关闭错误\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    _serverSocket = null;\r\n    _state = ServerState.stopped;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n",

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 124
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 51
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "} else {\r\n        return PingResult.success(\r\n          host: host,\r\n          avgTime: 0,\r\n          minTime: 0,\r\n          maxTime: 0,\r\n          packetLoss: 100,\r\n          received: 0,\r\n          rawOutput: output,\r\n        );\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      return PingResult.failure('解析Ping结果失败: $e');\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 检查端口是否在有效范围内\r\n  static bool isValidPort(int port) {\r\n    return port \u003e= AppConstants.minPort \u0026\u0026 port \u003c= AppConstants.maxPort;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 检查IP地址格式是否有效\r\n  static bool isValidIpAddress(String ip) {\r\n    try {\r\n      InternetAddress(ip);\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 检查主机名是否有效（IP或域名）\r\n  static bool isValidHost(String host) {\r\n    if (host.isEmpty) return false;\r\n\r\n    // 检查是否为有效IP\r\n    if (isValidIpAddress(host)) return true;\r\n\r\n    // 检查是否为有效域名格式\r\n    final domainRegex = RegExp(\r\n      r'^[a-zA-Z0-9]([a-zA-Z0-9-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?(\\.[a-zA-Z0-9]([a-zA-Z0-9-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?)*$',\r\n    );\r\n    return domainRegex.hasMatch(host);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// 网络接口信息\r\nclass NetworkInterfaceInfo {\r\n  final String name;\r\n  final String address;\r\n\r\n  NetworkInterfaceInfo({required this.name, required this.address});\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  String toString() =\u003e '$name ($address)';\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// Ping结果\r\nclass PingResult {\r\n  final bool isSuccess;\r\n  final String? host;\r\n  final double? avgTime;\r\n  final double? minTime;\r\n  final double? maxTime;\r\n  final int? packetLoss;\r\n  final int? received;\r\n  final String? rawOutput;\r\n  final String? error;\r\n\r\n  PingResult._({\r\n    required this.isSuccess,\r\n    this.host,\r\n    this.avgTime,\r\n    this.minTime,\r\n    this.maxTime,\r\n    this.packetLoss,\r\n    this.received,\r\n    this.rawOutput,\r\n    this.error,\r\n  });\r\n",

        "originalContents": "} else {\r\n        return PingResult.success(\r\n          host: host,\r\n          avgTime: 0,\r\n          minTime: 0,\r\n          maxTime: 0,\r\n          packetLoss: 100,\r\n          received: 0,\r\n          rawOutput: output,\r\n        );\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      return PingResult.failure('解析Ping结果失败: $e');\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 检查端口是否在有效范围内\r\n  static bool isValidPort(int port) {\r\n    return port \u003e= AppConstants.minPort \u0026\u0026 port \u003c= AppConstants.maxPort;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 检查IP地址格式是否有效\r\n  static bool isValidIpAddress(String ip) {\r\n    try {\r\n      InternetAddress(ip);\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 检查主机名是否有效（IP或域名）\r\n  static bool isValidHost(String host) {\r\n    if (host.isEmpty) return false;\r\n\r\n    // 检查是否为有效IP\r\n    if (isValidIpAddress(host)) return true;\r\n\r\n    // 检查是否为有效域名格式\r\n    final domainRegex = RegExp(\r\n      r'^[a-zA-Z0-9]([a-zA-Z0-9-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?(\\.[a-zA-Z0-9]([a-zA-Z0-9-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?)*$',\r\n    );\r\n    return domainRegex.hasMatch(host);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// 网络接口信息\r\nclass NetworkInterfaceInfo {\r\n  final String name;\r\n  final String address;\r\n\r\n  NetworkInterfaceInfo({required this.name, required this.address});\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  String toString() =\u003e '$name ($address)';\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// Ping结果\r\nclass PingResult {\r\n  final bool isSuccess;\r\n  final String? host;\r\n  final double? avgTime;\r\n  final double? minTime;\r\n  final double? maxTime;\r\n  final int? packetLoss;\r\n  final int? received;\r\n  final String? rawOutput;\r\n  final String? error;\r\n\r\n  PingResult._({\r\n    required this.isSuccess,\r\n    this.host,\r\n    this.avgTime,\r\n    this.minTime,\r\n    this.maxTime,\r\n    this.packetLoss,\r\n    this.received,\r\n    this.rawOutput,\r\n    this.error,\r\n  });\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import 'dart:async';\r\nimport 'dart:io';\r\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\r\nimport '../models/models.dart';\r\nimport '../utils/constants.dart';\r\n\r\n/// TCP客户端信息\r\nclass TcpClientInfo {\r\n  final String id;\r\n  final Socket socket;\r\n  final String address;\r\n  final int port;\r\n  final DateTime connectedAt;\r\n  final Statistics statistics;\r\n  StreamSubscription? subscription;\r\n\r\n  TcpClientInfo({\r\n    required this.id,\r\n    required this.socket,\r\n    required this.address,\r\n    required this.port,\r\n    DateTime? connectedAt,\r\n  }) : connectedAt = connectedAt ?? DateTime.now(),\r\n       statistics = Statistics()..start();\r\n\r\n  String get displayAddress =\u003e '$address:$port';\r\n\r\n  ConnectionInfo toConnectionInfo({bool isConnected = true}) {\r\n    return ConnectionInfo(\r\n      id: id,\r\n      remoteAddress: address,\r\n      remotePort: port,\r\n      connectedAt: connectedAt,\r\n      disconnectedAt: isConnected ? null : DateTime.now(),\r\n      isConnected: isConnected,\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// TCP服务器服务\r\nclass TcpServerService extends ChangeNotifier {\r\n  ServerSocket? _serverSocket;\r\n  ServerState _state = ServerState.stopped;\r\n  final Map\u003cString, TcpClientInfo\u003e _clients = {};\r\n  final List\u003cConnectionInfo\u003e _connectionHistory = [];\r\n  final List\u003cMessageData\u003e _messages = [];\r\n  final Statistics _statistics = Statistics();\r\n  String? _errorMessage;\r\n  bool _isPaused = false;\r\n\r\n  String _bindAddress = '0.0.0.0';\r\n  int _port = AppConstants.defaultTcpPort;\r\n",

        "originalContents": "import 'dart:async';\r\nimport 'dart:io';\r\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\r\nimport '../models/models.dart';\r\nimport '../utils/constants.dart';\r\n\r\n/// TCP客户端信息\r\nclass TcpClientInfo {\r\n  final String id;\r\n  final Socket socket;\r\n  final String address;\r\n  final int port;\r\n  final DateTime connectedAt;\r\n  final Statistics statistics;\r\n  StreamSubscription? subscription;\r\n\r\n  TcpClientInfo({\r\n    required this.id,\r\n    required this.socket,\r\n    required this.address,\r\n    required this.port,\r\n    DateTime? connectedAt,\r\n  }) : connectedAt = connectedAt ?? DateTime.now(),\r\n       statistics = Statistics()..start();\r\n\r\n  String get displayAddress =\u003e '$address:$port';\r\n\r\n  ConnectionInfo toConnectionInfo({bool isConnected = true}) {\r\n    return ConnectionInfo(\r\n      id: id,\r\n      remoteAddress: address,\r\n      remotePort: port,\r\n      connectedAt: connectedAt,\r\n      disconnectedAt: isConnected ? null : DateTime.now(),\r\n      isConnected: isConnected,\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// TCP服务器服务\r\nclass TcpServerService extends ChangeNotifier {\r\n  ServerSocket? _serverSocket;\r\n  ServerState _state = ServerState.stopped;\r\n  final Map\u003cString, TcpClientInfo\u003e _clients = {};\r\n  final List\u003cConnectionInfo\u003e _connectionHistory = [];\r\n  final List\u003cMessageData\u003e _messages = [];\r\n  final Statistics _statistics = Statistics();\r\n  String? _errorMessage;\r\n  bool _isPaused = false;\r\n\r\n  String _bindAddress = '0.0.0.0';\r\n  int _port = AppConstants.defaultTcpPort;\r\n",

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

项目已包含 Windows 支持，代码已处理 Windows 平台差异（如 ping 命令）。打包 Windows 应用的步骤：

## Windows 平台打包指南

### 1. 检查 Windows 平台支持

确认 Windows 平台已启用：

```powershell
flutter doctor
```

如果看到 Windows 相关错误，需要安装 Windows 开发工具。

### 2. 安装 Windows 开发工具（如未安装）

需要以下任一工具：
- Visual Studio 2022（推荐）
- Visual Studio Build Tools 2022

安装时需包含：
- "Desktop development with C++" 工作负载
- Windows 10/11 SDK

### 3. 启用 Windows 平台（如未启用）

```powershell
flutter config --enable-windows-desktop
flutter create --platforms=windows .
```

### 4. 打包 Windows 应用程序

#### 方式一：打包 Release 版本（推荐）

```powershell
# 设置 Flutter 镜像（如果需要）
$env:PUB_HOSTED_URL="https://pub.flutter-io.cn"
$env:FLUTTER_STORAGE_BASE_URL="https://storage.flutter-io.cn"

# 打包 Release 版本
flutter build windows --release
```

#### 方式二：打包 Debug 版本（用于测试）

```powershell
flutter build windows --debug
```

### 5. 输出位置

打包完成后，可执行文件位于：
```
build\windows\x64\runner\Release\net_debug_tool.exe
```

### 6. 分发应用程序

Windows 应用需要以下文件一起分发：
- `net_debug_tool.exe`（主程序）
- `data\` 目录（包含 Flutter 资源）
- `flutter_windows.dll`（Flutter 运行时库）
- 其他依赖的 DLL 文件

完整的分发包位于：
```
build\windows\x64\runner\Release\
```

可以将整个 `Release` 文件夹打包成 ZIP 分发。

### 7. 创建安装包（可选）

如需创建安装程序，可使用：
- Inno Setup
- NSIS
- WiX Toolset

### 注意事项

1. 防火墙：Windows 防火墙可能阻止网络功能，首次运行时需允许访问
2. 权限：TCP Server 模式可能需要管理员权限（绑定某些端口时）
3. 依赖：目标机器无需安装 Flutter，但需要 Windows 10 或更高版本
4. 图标：Windows 应用图标位于 `windows\runner\resources\app_icon.ico`

### 快速测试

先运行测试：

```powershell
flutter run -d windows
```

如果运行正常，再执行打包命令。

需要我帮你执行打包命令吗？切换到 agent 模式即可。

---

_**User (2026-01-22 01:53:15Z)**_

我需要增加两个功能，一是关于界面的，在连接建立之后(用户点击连接按钮)界面上方的参数部分能否折叠起来，以腾出更多空间展示通信消息，尤其是MQTT报文比较长，上半部分在连接之后几乎不会去修改，剩余空间常常显示不下一条完整的报文(大约剩余屏幕一半的空间)
二是MQTT目前没有保活的机制，在保活设置很短的服务器下测试，会频繁的被踢下线，这个功能需要留出开关来设置

请列出开发计划

        "contents": "\r\n  /// 连接到MQTT服务器\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e connect({\r\n    required String host,\r\n    required int port,\r\n    String? clientId,\r\n    String? username,\r\n    String? password,\r\n    bool useWebSocket = false,\r\n    bool useWss = false,\r\n    String wsPath = '/mqtt',\r\n    int keepAlive = 60,\r\n  }) async {\r\n    if (_state == ConnectionState.connecting ||\r\n        _state == ConnectionState.connected) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    _host = host;\r\n    _port = port;\r\n    _clientId = clientId ?? const Uuid().v4();\r\n    _username = username ?? '';\r\n    _password = password ?? '';\r\n    _useWebSocket = useWebSocket;\r\n    _useWss = useWss;\r\n    _wsPath = wsPath;\r\n    _keepAlive = keepAlive;\r\n\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.connecting;\r\n    _errorMessage = null;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      // 创建客户端\r\n      // 注意: mqtt_client 库的 WebSocket 路径通常使用默认值 /mqtt\r\n      // _wsPath 保留以备将来扩展\r\n      _client = MqttServerClient.withPort(host, _clientId, port);\r\n\r\n      if (_useWebSocket) {\r\n        _client!.useWebSocket = true;\r\n        _client!.websocketProtocols =\r\n            MqttClientConstants.protocolsSingleDefault;\r\n        if (_useWss) {\r\n          _client!.secure = true;\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      _client!.logging(on: false);\r\n      _client!.keepAlivePeriod = _keepAlive;\r\n      _client!.onConnected = _onConnected;\r\n      _client!.onDisconnected = _onDisconnected;\r\n      _client!.onSubscribed = _onSubscribed;\r\n      _client!.onUnsubscribed = _onUnsubscribed;\r\n      _client!.pongCallback = _onPong;\r\n\r\n      // 设置连接消息\r\n      final connMessage = MqttConnectMessage()\r\n          .withClientIdentifier(_clientId)\r\n          .startClean()\r\n          .withWillQos(MqttQos.atMostOnce);\r\n\r\n      if (_username.isNotEmpty) {\r\n        connMessage.authenticateAs(_username, _password);\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      _client!.connectionMessage = connMessage;\r\n\r\n      // 连接\r\n      await _client!.connect();\r\n",

        "contents": "import 'dart:async';\r\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\r\nimport 'package:mqtt_client/mqtt_client.dart';\r\nimport 'package:mqtt_client/mqtt_server_client.dart';\r\nimport 'package:typed_data/typed_data.dart';\r\nimport 'package:uuid/uuid.dart';\r\nimport '../models/models.dart';\r\nimport '../utils/constants.dart';\r\n\r\n/// MQTT订阅信息\r\nclass MqttSubscription {\r\n  final String topic;\r\n  final MqttQos qos;\r\n\r\n  MqttSubscription({required this.topic, required this.qos});\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  bool operator ==(Object other) =\u003e\r\n      identical(this, other) ||\r\n      other is MqttSubscription \u0026\u0026\r\n          runtimeType == other.runtimeType \u0026\u0026\r\n          topic == other.topic;\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  int get hashCode =\u003e topic.hashCode;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// MQTT服务\r\nclass MqttService extends ChangeNotifier {\r\n  MqttServerClient? _client;\r\n  ConnectionState _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n  final Statistics _statistics = Statistics();\r\n  final List\u003cMessageData\u003e _messages = [];\r\n  final List\u003cMqttSubscription\u003e _subscriptions = [];\r\n  String? _errorMessage;\r\n  bool _isPaused = false;\r\n\r\n  // 连接配置\r\n  String _host = '';\r\n  int _port = AppConstants.defaultMqttPort;\r\n  String _clientId = '';\r\n  String _username = '';\r\n  String _password = '';\r\n  bool _useWebSocket = false;\r\n  bool _useWss = false;\r\n  String _wsPath = AppConstants.defaultMqttWsPath;\r\n  int _keepAlive = AppConstants.mqttKeepAlive;\r\n\r\n  // Getters\r\n  ConnectionState get state =\u003e _state;\r\n  Statistics get statistics =\u003e _statistics;\r\n  List\u003cMessageData\u003e get messages =\u003e List.unmodifiable(_messages);\r\n  List\u003cMqttSubscription\u003e get subscriptions =\u003e List.unmodifiable(_subscriptions);\r\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e _errorMessage;\r\n  bool get isPaused =\u003e _isPaused;\r\n  bool get isConnected =\u003e _state == ConnectionState.connected;\r\n  String get host =\u003e _host;\r\n  int get port =\u003e _port;\r\n  String get clientId =\u003e _clientId;\r\n  String get wsPath =\u003e _wsPath;\r\n",

        "originalContents": "import 'dart:async';\r\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\r\nimport 'package:mqtt_client/mqtt_client.dart';\r\nimport 'package:mqtt_client/mqtt_server_client.dart';\r\nimport 'package:typed_data/typed_data.dart';\r\nimport 'package:uuid/uuid.dart';\r\nimport '../models/models.dart';\r\nimport '../utils/constants.dart';\r\n\r\n/// MQTT订阅信息\r\nclass MqttSubscription {\r\n  final String topic;\r\n  final MqttQos qos;\r\n\r\n  MqttSubscription({required this.topic, required this.qos});\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  bool operator ==(Object other) =\u003e\r\n      identical(this, other) ||\r\n      other is MqttSubscription \u0026\u0026\r\n          runtimeType == other.runtimeType \u0026\u0026\r\n          topic == other.topic;\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  int get hashCode =\u003e topic.hashCode;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// MQTT服务\r\nclass MqttService extends ChangeNotifier {\r\n  MqttServerClient? _client;\r\n  ConnectionState _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n  final Statistics _statistics = Statistics();\r\n  final List\u003cMessageData\u003e _messages = [];\r\n  final List\u003cMqttSubscription\u003e _subscriptions = [];\r\n  String? _errorMessage;\r\n  bool _isPaused = false;\r\n\r\n  // 连接配置\r\n  String _host = '';\r\n  int _port = AppConstants.defaultMqttPort;\r\n  String _clientId = '';\r\n  String _username = '';\r\n  String _password = '';\r\n  bool _useWebSocket = false;\r\n  bool _useWss = false;\r\n  String _wsPath = AppConstants.defaultMqttWsPath;\r\n  int _keepAlive = AppConstants.mqttKeepAlive;\r\n\r\n  // Getters\r\n  ConnectionState get state =\u003e _state;\r\n  Statistics get statistics =\u003e _statistics;\r\n  List\u003cMessageData\u003e get messages =\u003e List.unmodifiable(_messages);\r\n  List\u003cMqttSubscription\u003e get subscriptions =\u003e List.unmodifiable(_subscriptions);\r\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e _errorMessage;\r\n  bool get isPaused =\u003e _isPaused;\r\n  bool get isConnected =\u003e _state == ConnectionState.connected;\r\n  String get host =\u003e _host;\r\n  int get port =\u003e _port;\r\n  String get clientId =\u003e _clientId;\r\n  String get wsPath =\u003e _wsPath;\r\n",

// 秒\r\n  static const int receiveTimeout = 30; // 秒\r\n  static const int bufferSize = 4096; // 字节\r\n\r\n  // Ping配置\r\n  static const int pingCount = 3;\r\n  static const int pingTimeout = 6; // 秒\r\n\r\n  // MQTT配置\r\n  static const int mqttKeepAlive = 60; // 秒\r\n  static const String defaultMqttWsPath = '/mqtt';\r\n\r\n  // 历史记录配置\r\n  static const int maxSendHistory = 10;\r\n  static const int maxConnectionHistory = 100;\r\n  static const int maxMessageHistory = 1000;\r\n\r\n  // 客户端限制\r\n  static const int maxTcpClients = 50;\r\n\r\n  // SharedPreferences键\r\n  static const String prefTcpClientHistory = 'tcp_client_send_history';\r\n  static const String prefTcpServerHistory = 'tcp_server_send_history';\r\n  static const String prefUdpHistory = 'udp_send_history';\r\n  static const String prefMqttHistory = 'mqtt_send_history';\r\n\r\n  // MQTT配置持久化键\r\n  static const String prefMqttHost = 'mqtt_host';\r\n  static const String prefMqttPort = 'mqtt_port';\r\n  static const String prefMqttUsername = 'mqtt_username';\r\n  static const String prefMqttUseWebSocket = 'mqtt_use_websocket';\r\n  static const String prefMqttUseWss = 'mqtt_use_wss';\r\n  static const String prefMqttWsPath = 'mqtt_ws_path';\r\n  static const String prefMqttTopicHistory = 'mqtt_topic_history';\r\n  static const String prefMqttLastSubTopic = 'mqtt_last_sub_topic';\r\n  static const String prefMqttLastPubTopic = 'mqtt_last_pub_topic';\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// 连接状态\r\n",

        "originalContents": "/// 应用常量定义\r\nclass AppConstants {\r\n  // 应用信息\r\n  static const String appName = '网络调试助手';\r\n  static const String appVersion = '1.0.0';\r\n\r\n  // 网络配置\r\n  static const int defaultTcpPort = 8080;\r\n  static const int defaultUdpPort = 8081;\r\n  static const int defaultMqttPort = 1883;\r\n  static const int defaultMqttWsPort = 8083;\r\n  static const int defaultMqttWssPort = 8084;\r\n\r\n  static const int minPort = 1024;\r\n  static const int maxPort = 65535;\r\n\r\n  // 连接配置\r\n  static const int connectionTimeout = 10; // 秒\r\n  static const int receiveTimeout = 30; // 秒\r\n  static const int bufferSize = 4096; // 字节\r\n\r\n  // Ping配置\r\n  static const int pingCount = 3;\r\n  static const int pingTimeout = 6; // 秒\r\n\r\n  // MQTT配置\r\n  static const int mqttKeepAlive = 60; // 秒\r\n  static const String defaultMqttWsPath = '/mqtt';\r\n\r\n  // 历史记录配置\r\n  static const int maxSendHistory = 10;\r\n  static const int maxConnectionHistory = 100;\r\n  static const int maxMessageHistory = 1000;\r\n\r\n  // 客户端限制\r\n  static const int maxTcpClients = 50;\r\n\r\n  // SharedPreferences键\r\n  static const String prefTcpClientHistory = 'tcp_client_send_history';\r\n  static const String prefTcpServerHistory = 'tcp_server_send_history';\r\n  static const String prefUdpHistory = 'udp_send_history';\r\n  static const String prefMqttHistory = 'mqtt_send_history';\r\n\r\n  // MQTT配置持久化键\r\n  static const String prefMqttHost = 'mqtt_host';\r\n  static const String prefMqttPort = 'mqtt_port';\r\n  static const String prefMqttUsername = 'mqtt_username';\r\n  static const String prefMqttUseWebSocket = 'mqtt_use_websocket';\r\n  static const String prefMqttUseWss = 'mqtt_use_wss';\r\n  static const String prefMqttWsPath = 'mqtt_ws_path';\r\n  static const String prefMqttTopicHistory = 'mqtt_topic_history';\r\n  static const String prefMqttLastSubTopic = 'mqtt_last_sub_topic';\r\n  static const String prefMqttLastPubTopic = 'mqtt_last_pub_topic';\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// 连接状态\r\n",
