```json
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n      final messageData = MessageData(\r\n        id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n        data: data,\r\n        direction: MessageDirection.received,\r\n        topic: topic,\r\n        qos: payload.header?.qos.index,\r\n      );\r\n      _addMessage(messageData);\r\n    }\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 连接成功回调\r\n  void _onConnected() {\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.connected;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 断开连接回调\r\n  void _onDisconnected() {\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n    _subscriptions.clear();\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 订阅成功回调\r\n  void _onSubscribed(String topic) {\r\n    // 已在subscribe方法中处理\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 取消订阅回调\r\n  void _onUnsubscribed(String? topic) {\r\n    // 已在unsubscribe方法中处理\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// Pong回调\r\n  void _onPong() {\r\n    // Keep alive pong received\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 添加消息（限制数量）\r\n  void _addMessage(MessageData message) {\r\n    _messages.add(message);\r\n    if (_messages.length \u003e AppConstants.maxMessageHistory) {\r\n      _messages.removeAt(0);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 暂停接收\r\n  void pause() {\r\n    _isPaused = true;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 继续接收\r\n  void resume() {\r\n    _isPaused = false;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 清空消息\r\n  void clearMessages() {\r\n    _messages.clear();\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 重置统计信息\r\n  void resetStatistics() {\r\n    _statistics.reset();\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 清除错误\r\n  void clearError() {\r\n    _errorMessage = null;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 获取QoS显示名称\r\n  static String getQosName(MqttQos qos) {\r\n    switch (qos) {\r\n      case MqttQos.atMostOnce:\r\n        return 'QoS 0 (最多一次)';\r\n      case MqttQos.atLeastOnce:\r\n        return 'QoS 1 (至少一次)';\r\n      case MqttQos.exactlyOnce:\r\n        return 'QoS 2 (恰好一次)';\r\n      default:\r\n        return 'QoS 0';\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "  /// 清除错误\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "  /// 获取QoS显示名称\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "  static String getQosName(MqttQos qos) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "    switch (qos) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "      case MqttQos.atMostOnce:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "        return 'QoS 0 (最多一次)';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "      case MqttQos.atLeastOnce:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "        return 'QoS 1 (至少一次)';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "      case MqttQos.exactlyOnce:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "        return 'QoS 2 (恰好一次)';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "      default:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "        return 'QoS 0';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "  }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "  @override\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "  void dispose() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "    disconnect();\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n      final messageData = MessageData(\r\n        id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n        data: data,\r\n        direction: MessageDirection.received,\r\n        topic: topic,\r\n        qos: payload.header?.qos.index,\r\n      );\r\n      _addMessage(messageData);\r\n    }\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 连接成功回调\r\n  void _onConnected() {\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.connected;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 断开连接回调\r\n  void _onDisconnected() {\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n    _subscriptions.clear();\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 订阅成功回调\r\n  void _onSubscribed(String topic) {\r\n    // 已在subscribe方法中处理\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 取消订阅回调\r\n  void _onUnsubscribed(String? topic) {\r\n    // 已在unsubscribe方法中处理\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// Pong回调\r\n  void _onPong() {\r\n    // Keep alive pong received\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 添加消息（限制数量）\r\n  void _addMessage(MessageData message) {\r\n    _messages.add(message);\r\n    if (_messages.length \u003e AppConstants.maxMessageHistory) {\r\n      _messages.removeAt(0);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 暂停接收\r\n  void pause() {\r\n    _isPaused = true;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 继续接收\r\n  void resume() {\r\n    _isPaused = false;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 清空消息\r\n  void clearMessages() {\r\n    _messages.clear();\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 重置统计信息\r\n  void resetStatistics() {\r\n    _statistics.reset();\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 清除错误\r\n  void clearError() {\r\n    _errorMessage = null;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 获取QoS显示名称\r\n  static String getQosName(MqttQos qos) {\r\n    switch (qos) {\r\n      case MqttQos.atMostOnce:\r\n        return 'QoS 0 (最多一次)';\r\n      case MqttQos.atLeastOnce:\r\n        return 'QoS 1 (至少一次)';\r\n      case MqttQos.exactlyOnce:\r\n        return 'QoS 2 (恰好一次)';\r\n      default:\r\n        return 'QoS 0';\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 359
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 261
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "lib/services/mqtt_service.dart"
      },
      "score": 0.3980086147785187
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    try {\r\n      _client!.unsubscribe(topic);\r\n      _subscriptions.removeWhere((s) =\u003e s.topic == topic);\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '取消订阅失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 发布消息\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e publish(\r\n    String topic,\r\n    Uint8List data, {\r\n    MqttQos qos = MqttQos.atMostOnce,\r\n    bool retain = false,\r\n  }) async {\r\n    if (!isConnected || _client == null) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '未连接到服务器';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      final builder = MqttClientPayloadBuilder();\r\n      final buffer = Uint8Buffer()..addAll(data);\r\n      builder.addBuffer(buffer);\r\n\r\n      _client!.publishMessage(topic, qos, builder.payload!, retain: retain);\r\n\r\n      _statistics.addSentData(data.length);\r\n\r\n      final message = MessageData(\r\n        id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n        data: data,\r\n        direction: MessageDirection.sent,\r\n        topic: topic,\r\n        qos: qos.index,\r\n      );\r\n      _addMessage(message);\r\n\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '发布失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理接收消息\r\n  void _onMessage(List\u003cMqttReceivedMessage\u003cMqttMessage\u003e\u003e messages) {\r\n    if (_isPaused) return;\r\n\r\n    for (final message in messages) {\r\n      final topic = message.topic;\r\n      final payload = message.payload as MqttPublishMessage;\r\n      final data = Uint8List.fromList(payload.payload.message);\r\n\r\n      _statistics.addReceivedData(data.length);\r\n",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    try {\r\n      _client!.unsubscribe(topic);\r\n      _subscriptions.removeWhere((s) =\u003e s.topic == topic);\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '取消订阅失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 发布消息\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e publish(\r\n    String topic,\r\n    Uint8List data, {\r\n    MqttQos qos = MqttQos.atMostOnce,\r\n    bool retain = false,\r\n  }) async {\r\n    if (!isConnected || _client == null) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '未连接到服务器';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      final builder = MqttClientPayloadBuilder();\r\n      final buffer = Uint8Buffer()..addAll(data);\r\n      builder.addBuffer(buffer);\r\n\r\n      _client!.publishMessage(topic, qos, builder.payload!, retain: retain);\r\n\r\n      _statistics.addSentData(data.length);\r\n\r\n      final message = MessageData(\r\n        id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n        data: data,\r\n        direction: MessageDirection.sent,\r\n        topic: topic,\r\n        qos: qos.index,\r\n      );\r\n      _addMessage(message);\r\n\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '发布失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理接收消息\r\n  void _onMessage(List\u003cMqttReceivedMessage\u003cMqttMessage\u003e\u003e messages) {\r\n    if (_isPaused) return;\r\n\r\n    for (final message in messages) {\r\n      final topic = message.topic;\r\n      final payload = message.payload as MqttPublishMessage;\r\n      final data = Uint8List.fromList(payload.payload.message);\r\n\r\n      _statistics.addReceivedData(data.length);\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 8,
            "line": 265
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 196
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "lib/services/mqtt_service.dart"
      },
      "score": 0.38017773628234863
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n      if (_client!.connectionStatus?.state == MqttConnectionState.connected) {\r\n        _state = ConnectionState.connected;\r\n        _statistics.start();\r\n        _errorMessage = null;\r\n\r\n        // 监听消息\r\n        _client!.updates?.listen(_onMessage);\r\n\r\n        notifyListeners();\r\n        return true;\r\n      } else {\r\n        _state = ConnectionState.error;\r\n        _errorMessage = '连接失败: ${_client!.connectionStatus?.returnCode}';\r\n        notifyListeners();\r\n        return false;\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.error;\r\n      _errorMessage = '连接失败: $e';\r\n      _client?.disconnect();\r\n      _client = null;\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 断开连接\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e disconnect() async {\r\n    _client?.disconnect();\r\n    _client = null;\r\n    _subscriptions.clear();\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 订阅主题\r\n  bool subscribe(String topic, {MqttQos qos = MqttQos.atMostOnce}) {\r\n    if (!isConnected || _client == null) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '未连接到服务器';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      _client!.subscribe(topic, qos);\r\n\r\n      final subscription = MqttSubscription(topic: topic, qos: qos);\r\n      if (!_subscriptions.contains(subscription)) {\r\n        _subscriptions.add(subscription);\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '订阅失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 取消订阅\r\n  bool unsubscribe(String topic) {\r\n    if (!isConnected || _client == null) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '未连接到服务器';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [

          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "  /// 取消订阅\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "  bool unsubscribe(String topic) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "    if (!isConnected || _client == null) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "      _errorMessage = '未连接到服务器';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "      notifyListeners();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "      return false;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "    try {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "      _client!.unsubscribe(topic);\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n      if (_client!.connectionStatus?.state == MqttConnectionState.connected) {\r\n        _state = ConnectionState.connected;\r\n        _statistics.start();\r\n        _errorMessage = null;\r\n\r\n        // 监听消息\r\n        _client!.updates?.listen(_onMessage);\r\n\r\n        notifyListeners();\r\n        return true;\r\n      } else {\r\n        _state = ConnectionState.error;\r\n        _errorMessage = '连接失败: ${_client!.connectionStatus?.returnCode}';\r\n        notifyListeners();\r\n        return false;\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.error;\r\n      _errorMessage = '连接失败: $e';\r\n      _client?.disconnect();\r\n      _client = null;\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 断开连接\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e disconnect() async {\r\n    _client?.disconnect();\r\n    _client = null;\r\n    _subscriptions.clear();\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 订阅主题\r\n  bool subscribe(String topic, {MqttQos qos = MqttQos.atMostOnce}) {\r\n    if (!isConnected || _client == null) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '未连接到服务器';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      _client!.subscribe(topic, qos);\r\n\r\n      final subscription = MqttSubscription(topic: topic, qos: qos);\r\n      if (!_subscriptions.contains(subscription)) {\r\n        _subscriptions.add(subscription);\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '订阅失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 取消订阅\r\n  bool unsubscribe(String topic) {\r\n    if (!isConnected || _client == null) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '未连接到服务器';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 201
          },
          "startPosition": {

          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n  /// 断开连接\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e disconnect() async {\r\n    await _subscription?.cancel();\r\n    _subscription = null;\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      await _socket?.close();\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      // 忽略关闭错误\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    _socket = null;\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 发送数据\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e send(Uint8List data) async {\r\n    if (!isConnected || _socket == null) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '未连接到服务器';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      _socket!.add(data);\r\n      await _socket!.flush();\r\n\r\n      _statistics.addSentData(data.length);\r\n\r\n      final message = MessageData(\r\n        id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n        data: data,\r\n        direction: MessageDirection.sent,\r\n      );\r\n      _addMessage(message);\r\n\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _errorMessage = '发送失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理接收数据\r\n  void _onData(Uint8List data) {\r\n    if (_isPaused) return;\r\n\r\n    _statistics.addReceivedData(data.length);\r\n\r\n    final message = MessageData(\r\n      id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n      data: data,\r\n      direction: MessageDirection.received,\r\n    );\r\n    _addMessage(message);\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理错误\r\n  void _onError(dynamic error) {\r\n    _errorMessage = '连接错误: $error';\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.error;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理连接关闭\r\n  void _onDone() {\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n    _socket = null;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 添加消息（限制数量）\r\n  void _addMessage(MessageData message) {\r\n    _messages.add(message);\r\n    if (_messages.length \u003e AppConstants.maxMessageHistory) {\r\n      _messages.removeAt(0);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _toggleConnection(MqttService service) async {\r\n    if (service.isConnected) {\r\n      await service.disconnect();\r\n    } else {\r\n      final host = _hostController.text.trim();\r\n      final port =\r\n          int.tryParse(_portController.text.trim()) ??\r\n          AppConstants.defaultMqttPort;\r\n      final username = _usernameController.text.trim();\r\n      final password = _passwordController.text;\r\n      final wsPath = _wsPathController.text.trim();\r\n\r\n      if (host.isEmpty) {\r\n        return;\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      // 保存连接配置\r\n      await SendHistoryService.instance.saveMqttConfig(\r\n        host: host,\r\n        port: port,\r\n        username: username,\r\n        useWebSocket: _useWebSocket,\r\n        useWss: _useWss,\r\n        wsPath: wsPath,\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      await service.connect(\r\n        host: host,\r\n        port: port,\r\n        username: username.isNotEmpty ? username : null,\r\n        password: password.isNotEmpty ? password : null,\r\n        useWebSocket: _useWebSocket,\r\n        useWss: _useWss,\r\n        wsPath: wsPath.isNotEmpty ? wsPath : '/mqtt',\r\n      );\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _publish(MqttService service) async {\r\n    final topic = _publishTopicController.text.trim();\r\n    final message = _publishMessageController.text;\r\n\r\n    if (topic.isEmpty || message.isEmpty) {\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    final result = DataConverter.stringToBytes(message, _sendFormat, _encoding);\r\n    if (!result.isSuccess) {\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    final success = await service.publish(\r\n      topic,\r\n      result.data!,\r\n      qos: _publishQos,\r\n    );\r\n    if (success) {\r\n      // 保存到历史\r\n      await SendHistoryService.instance.addMqttHistory(message);\r\n      await SendHistoryService.instance.saveLastPubTopic(topic);\r\n      _loadSendHistory();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _toggleConnection(MqttService service) async {\r\n    if (service.isConnected) {\r\n      await service.disconnect();\r\n    } else {\r\n      final host = _hostController.text.trim();\r\n      final port =\r\n          int.tryParse(_portController.text.trim()) ??\r\n          AppConstants.defaultMqttPort;\r\n      final username = _usernameController.text.trim();\r\n      final password = _passwordController.text;\r\n      final wsPath = _wsPathController.text.trim();\r\n\r\n      if (host.isEmpty) {\r\n        return;\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      // 保存连接配置\r\n      await SendHistoryService.instance.saveMqttConfig(\r\n        host: host,\r\n        port: port,\r\n        username: username,\r\n        useWebSocket: _useWebSocket,\r\n        useWss: _useWss,\r\n        wsPath: wsPath,\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      await service.connect(\r\n        host: host,\r\n        port: port,\r\n        username: username.isNotEmpty ? username : null,\r\n        password: password.isNotEmpty ? password : null,\r\n        useWebSocket: _useWebSocket,\r\n        useWss: _useWss,\r\n        wsPath: wsPath.isNotEmpty ? wsPath : '/mqtt',\r\n      );\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _publish(MqttService service) async {\r\n    final topic = _publishTopicController.text.trim();\r\n    final message = _publishMessageController.text;\r\n\r\n    if (topic.isEmpty || message.isEmpty) {\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    final result = DataConverter.stringToBytes(message, _sendFormat, _encoding);\r\n    if (!result.isSuccess) {\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    final success = await service.publish(\r\n      topic,\r\n      result.data!,\r\n      qos: _publishQos,\r\n    );\r\n    if (success) {\r\n      // 保存到历史\r\n      await SendHistoryService.instance.addMqttHistory(message);\r\n      await SendHistoryService.instance.saveLastPubTopic(topic);\r\n      _loadSendHistory();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n",

          "endPosition": {

            "line": 583
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n  /// 处理新客户端连接\r\n  void _onClientConnect(Socket socket) {\r\n    if (_clients.length \u003e= AppConstants.maxTcpClients) {\r\n      socket.close();\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    final id =\r\n        '${socket.remoteAddress.address}:${socket.remotePort}_${DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch}';\r\n    final client = TcpClientInfo(\r\n      id: id,\r\n      socket: socket,\r\n      address: socket.remoteAddress.address,\r\n      port: socket.remotePort,\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    _clients[id] = client;\r\n\r\n    // 监听客户端数据\r\n    client.subscription = socket.listen(\r\n      (data) =\u003e _onClientData(id, Uint8List.fromList(data)),\r\n      onError: (error) =\u003e _onClientError(id, error),\r\n      onDone: () =\u003e _onClientDone(id),\r\n      cancelOnError: false,\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理客户端数据\r\n  void _onClientData(String clientId, Uint8List data) {\r\n    if (_isPaused) return;\r\n\r\n    final client = _clients[clientId];\r\n    if (client == null) return;\r\n\r\n    client.statistics.addReceivedData(data.length);\r\n    _statistics.addReceivedData(data.length);\r\n\r\n    final message = MessageData(\r\n      id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n      data: data,\r\n      direction: MessageDirection.received,\r\n      source: client.displayAddress,\r\n    );\r\n    _addMessage(message);\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理客户端错误\r\n  void _onClientError(String clientId, dynamic error) {\r\n    _disconnectClient(clientId, addToHistory: true);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理客户端断开\r\n  void _onClientDone(String clientId) {\r\n    _disconnectClient(clientId, addToHistory: true);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 断开指定客户端\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _disconnectClient(\r\n    String clientId, {\r\n    bool addToHistory = false,\r\n  }) async {\r\n    final client = _clients.remove(clientId);\r\n    if (client == null) return;\r\n\r\n    await client.subscription?.cancel();\r\n    try {\r\n      await client.socket.close();\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      // 忽略关闭错误\r\n    }\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n  /// 处理新客户端连接\r\n  void _onClientConnect(Socket socket) {\r\n    if (_clients.length \u003e= AppConstants.maxTcpClients) {\r\n      socket.close();\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    final id =\r\n        '${socket.remoteAddress.address}:${socket.remotePort}_${DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch}';\r\n    final client = TcpClientInfo(\r\n      id: id,\r\n      socket: socket,\r\n      address: socket.remoteAddress.address,\r\n      port: socket.remotePort,\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    _clients[id] = client;\r\n\r\n    // 监听客户端数据\r\n    client.subscription = socket.listen(\r\n      (data) =\u003e _onClientData(id, Uint8List.fromList(data)),\r\n      onError: (error) =\u003e _onClientError(id, error),\r\n      onDone: () =\u003e _onClientDone(id),\r\n      cancelOnError: false,\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理客户端数据\r\n  void _onClientData(String clientId, Uint8List data) {\r\n    if (_isPaused) return;\r\n\r\n    final client = _clients[clientId];\r\n    if (client == null) return;\r\n\r\n    client.statistics.addReceivedData(data.length);\r\n    _statistics.addReceivedData(data.length);\r\n\r\n    final message = MessageData(\r\n      id: DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),\r\n      data: data,\r\n      direction: MessageDirection.received,\r\n      source: client.displayAddress,\r\n    );\r\n    _addMessage(message);\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理客户端错误\r\n  void _onClientError(String clientId, dynamic error) {\r\n    _disconnectClient(clientId, addToHistory: true);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 处理客户端断开\r\n  void _onClientDone(String clientId) {\r\n    _disconnectClient(clientId, addToHistory: true);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 断开指定客户端\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _disconnectClient(\r\n    String clientId, {\r\n    bool addToHistory = false,\r\n  }) async {\r\n    final client = _clients.remove(clientId);\r\n    if (client == null) return;\r\n\r\n    await client.subscription?.cancel();\r\n    try {\r\n      await client.socket.close();\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      // 忽略关闭错误\r\n    }\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import 'package:flutter/material.dart';\r\nimport 'package:provider/provider.dart';\r\nimport '../../models/message_data.dart';\r\nimport '../../services/tcp_client_service.dart';\r\nimport '../../services/network_tool_service.dart';\r\nimport '../../services/send_history_service.dart';\r\nimport '../../utils/constants.dart';\r\nimport '../../utils/data_converter.dart';\r\nimport '../../widgets/widgets.dart';\r\n\r\nclass TcpClientPage extends StatefulWidget {\r\n  const TcpClientPage({super.key});\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  State\u003cTcpClientPage\u003e createState() =\u003e _TcpClientPageState();\r\n}\r\n\r\nclass _TcpClientPageState extends State\u003cTcpClientPage\u003e {\r\n  final _hostController = TextEditingController(text: '192.168.1.1');\r\n  final _portController = TextEditingController(text: '8080');\r\n  final _sendController = TextEditingController();\r\n\r\n  DataFormat _sendFormat = DataFormat.text;\r\n  DataFormat _receiveFormat = DataFormat.text;\r\n  CharEncoding _encoding = CharEncoding.utf8;\r\n  bool _isPinging = false;\r\n  String? _pingResult;\r\n  List\u003cString\u003e _sendHistory = [];\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  void initState() {\r\n    super.initState();\r\n    _loadSendHistory();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  void dispose() {\r\n    _hostController.dispose();\r\n    _portController.dispose();\r\n    _sendController.dispose();\r\n    super.dispose();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _loadSendHistory() async {\r\n    final history = SendHistoryService.instance.tcpClientHistory;\r\n    setState(() {\r\n      _sendHistory = history;\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _ping() async {\r\n    final host = _hostController.text.trim();\r\n    if (host.isEmpty) {\r\n      setState(() {\r\n        _pingResult = '请输入主机地址';\r\n      });\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    setState(() {\r\n      _isPinging = true;\r\n      _pingResult = null;\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    final result = await NetworkToolService.ping(host);\r\n\r\n    setState(() {\r\n      _isPinging = false;\r\n      _pingResult = result.summary;\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n",

        ],
        "originalContents": "import 'package:flutter/material.dart';\r\nimport 'package:provider/provider.dart';\r\nimport '../../models/message_data.dart';\r\nimport '../../services/tcp_client_service.dart';\r\nimport '../../services/network_tool_service.dart';\r\nimport '../../services/send_history_service.dart';\r\nimport '../../utils/constants.dart';\r\nimport '../../utils/data_converter.dart';\r\nimport '../../widgets/widgets.dart';\r\n\r\nclass TcpClientPage extends StatefulWidget {\r\n  const TcpClientPage({super.key});\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  State\u003cTcpClientPage\u003e createState() =\u003e _TcpClientPageState();\r\n}\r\n\r\nclass _TcpClientPageState extends State\u003cTcpClientPage\u003e {\r\n  final _hostController = TextEditingController(text: '192.168.1.1');\r\n  final _portController = TextEditingController(text: '8080');\r\n  final _sendController = TextEditingController();\r\n\r\n  DataFormat _sendFormat = DataFormat.text;\r\n  DataFormat _receiveFormat = DataFormat.text;\r\n  CharEncoding _encoding = CharEncoding.utf8;\r\n  bool _isPinging = false;\r\n  String? _pingResult;\r\n  List\u003cString\u003e _sendHistory = [];\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  void initState() {\r\n    super.initState();\r\n    _loadSendHistory();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  void dispose() {\r\n    _hostController.dispose();\r\n    _portController.dispose();\r\n    _sendController.dispose();\r\n    super.dispose();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _loadSendHistory() async {\r\n    final history = SendHistoryService.instance.tcpClientHistory;\r\n    setState(() {\r\n      _sendHistory = history;\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e _ping() async {\r\n    final host = _hostController.text.trim();\r\n    if (host.isEmpty) {\r\n      setState(() {\r\n        _pingResult = '请输入主机地址';\r\n      });\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    setState(() {\r\n      _isPinging = true;\r\n      _pingResult = null;\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    final result = await NetworkToolService.ping(host);\r\n\r\n    setState(() {\r\n      _isPinging = false;\r\n      _pingResult = result.summary;\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n",

        "contents": "import 'dart:async';\r\nimport 'dart:io';\r\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\r\nimport '../models/models.dart';\r\nimport '../utils/constants.dart';\r\n\r\n/// TCP客户端服务\r\nclass TcpClientService extends ChangeNotifier {\r\n  Socket? _socket;\r\n  ConnectionState _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n  final Statistics _statistics = Statistics();\r\n  final List\u003cMessageData\u003e _messages = [];\r\n  String? _errorMessage;\r\n  bool _isPaused = false;\r\n  StreamSubscription? _subscription;\r\n\r\n  String _host = '';\r\n  int _port = AppConstants.defaultTcpPort;\r\n\r\n  // Getters\r\n  ConnectionState get state =\u003e _state;\r\n  Statistics get statistics =\u003e _statistics;\r\n  List\u003cMessageData\u003e get messages =\u003e List.unmodifiable(_messages);\r\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e _errorMessage;\r\n  bool get isPaused =\u003e _isPaused;\r\n  bool get isConnected =\u003e _state == ConnectionState.connected;\r\n  String get host =\u003e _host;\r\n  int get port =\u003e _port;\r\n\r\n  /// 连接到服务器\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e connect(String host, int port) async {\r\n    if (_state == ConnectionState.connecting ||\r\n        _state == ConnectionState.connected) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    _host = host;\r\n    _port = port;\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.connecting;\r\n    _errorMessage = null;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      _socket = await Socket.connect(\r\n        host,\r\n        port,\r\n        timeout: const Duration(seconds: AppConstants.connectionTimeout),\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.connected;\r\n      _statistics.start();\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n\r\n      // 监听数据\r\n      _subscription = _socket!.listen(\r\n        _onData,\r\n        onError: _onError,\r\n        onDone: _onDone,\r\n        cancelOnError: false,\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.error;\r\n      _errorMessage = '连接失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n",

        "originalContents": "import 'dart:async';\r\nimport 'dart:io';\r\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\r\nimport '../models/models.dart';\r\nimport '../utils/constants.dart';\r\n\r\n/// TCP客户端服务\r\nclass TcpClientService extends ChangeNotifier {\r\n  Socket? _socket;\r\n  ConnectionState _state = ConnectionState.disconnected;\r\n  final Statistics _statistics = Statistics();\r\n  final List\u003cMessageData\u003e _messages = [];\r\n  String? _errorMessage;\r\n  bool _isPaused = false;\r\n  StreamSubscription? _subscription;\r\n\r\n  String _host = '';\r\n  int _port = AppConstants.defaultTcpPort;\r\n\r\n  // Getters\r\n  ConnectionState get state =\u003e _state;\r\n  Statistics get statistics =\u003e _statistics;\r\n  List\u003cMessageData\u003e get messages =\u003e List.unmodifiable(_messages);\r\n  String? get errorMessage =\u003e _errorMessage;\r\n  bool get isPaused =\u003e _isPaused;\r\n  bool get isConnected =\u003e _state == ConnectionState.connected;\r\n  String get host =\u003e _host;\r\n  int get port =\u003e _port;\r\n\r\n  /// 连接到服务器\r\n  Future\u003cbool\u003e connect(String host, int port) async {\r\n    if (_state == ConnectionState.connecting ||\r\n        _state == ConnectionState.connected) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    _host = host;\r\n    _port = port;\r\n    _state = ConnectionState.connecting;\r\n    _errorMessage = null;\r\n    notifyListeners();\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      _socket = await Socket.connect(\r\n        host,\r\n        port,\r\n        timeout: const Duration(seconds: AppConstants.connectionTimeout),\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.connected;\r\n      _statistics.start();\r\n      _errorMessage = null;\r\n\r\n      // 监听数据\r\n      _subscription = _socket!.listen(\r\n        _onData,\r\n        onError: _onError,\r\n        onDone: _onDone,\r\n        cancelOnError: false,\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return true;\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      _state = ConnectionState.error;\r\n      _errorMessage = '连接失败: $e';\r\n      notifyListeners();\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n  /// 获取整数值\r\n  int? getInt(String key) {\r\n    return _prefs?.getInt(key);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 设置整数值\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e setInt(String key, int value) async {\r\n    await _prefs?.setInt(key, value);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 获取布尔值\r\n  bool? getBool(String key) {\r\n    return _prefs?.getBool(key);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 设置布尔值\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e setBool(String key, bool value) async {\r\n    await _prefs?.setBool(key, value);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 保存MQTT连接配置\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e saveMqttConfig({\r\n    required String host,\r\n    required int port,\r\n    String? username,\r\n    required bool useWebSocket,\r\n    required bool useWss,\r\n    String? wsPath,\r\n  }) async {\r\n    await setString(AppConstants.prefMqttHost, host);\r\n    await setInt(AppConstants.prefMqttPort, port);\r\n    if (username != null \u0026\u0026 username.isNotEmpty) {\r\n      await setString(AppConstants.prefMqttUsername, username);\r\n    }\r\n    await setBool(AppConstants.prefMqttUseWebSocket, useWebSocket);\r\n    await setBool(AppConstants.prefMqttUseWss, useWss);\r\n    if (wsPath != null \u0026\u0026 wsPath.isNotEmpty) {\r\n      await setString(AppConstants.prefMqttWsPath, wsPath);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 获取MQTT连接配置\r\n  Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e getMqttConfig() {\r\n    return {\r\n      'host': getString(AppConstants.prefMqttHost) ?? 'broker.emqx.io',\r\n      'port': getInt(AppConstants.prefMqttPort) ?? 1883,\r\n      'username': getString(AppConstants.prefMqttUsername) ?? '',\r\n      'useWebSocket': getBool(AppConstants.prefMqttUseWebSocket) ?? false,\r\n      'useWss': getBool(AppConstants.prefMqttUseWss) ?? false,\r\n      'wsPath': getString(AppConstants.prefMqttWsPath) ?? '/mqtt',\r\n    };\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 保存最后使用的订阅主题\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e saveLastSubTopic(String topic) async {\r\n    await setString(AppConstants.prefMqttLastSubTopic, topic);\r\n    await addMqttTopicHistory(topic);\r\n  }\r\n",

            "lineNumber": 200,

            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "  /// 获取最后使用的订阅主题\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n  /// 获取整数值\r\n  int? getInt(String key) {\r\n    return _prefs?.getInt(key);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 设置整数值\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e setInt(String key, int value) async {\r\n    await _prefs?.setInt(key, value);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 获取布尔值\r\n  bool? getBool(String key) {\r\n    return _prefs?.getBool(key);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 设置布尔值\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e setBool(String key, bool value) async {\r\n    await _prefs?.setBool(key, value);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 保存MQTT连接配置\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e saveMqttConfig({\r\n    required String host,\r\n    required int port,\r\n    String? username,\r\n    required bool useWebSocket,\r\n    required bool useWss,\r\n    String? wsPath,\r\n  }) async {\r\n    await setString(AppConstants.prefMqttHost, host);\r\n    await setInt(AppConstants.prefMqttPort, port);\r\n    if (username != null \u0026\u0026 username.isNotEmpty) {\r\n      await setString(AppConstants.prefMqttUsername, username);\r\n    }\r\n    await setBool(AppConstants.prefMqttUseWebSocket, useWebSocket);\r\n    await setBool(AppConstants.prefMqttUseWss, useWss);\r\n    if (wsPath != null \u0026\u0026 wsPath.isNotEmpty) {\r\n      await setString(AppConstants.prefMqttWsPath, wsPath);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 获取MQTT连接配置\r\n  Map\u003cString, dynamic\u003e getMqttConfig() {\r\n    return {\r\n      'host': getString(AppConstants.prefMqttHost) ?? 'broker.emqx.io',\r\n      'port': getInt(AppConstants.prefMqttPort) ?? 1883,\r\n      'username': getString(AppConstants.prefMqttUsername) ?? '',\r\n      'useWebSocket': getBool(AppConstants.prefMqttUseWebSocket) ?? false,\r\n      'useWss': getBool(AppConstants.prefMqttUseWss) ?? false,\r\n      'wsPath': getString(AppConstants.prefMqttWsPath) ?? '/mqtt',\r\n    };\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /// 保存最后使用的订阅主题\r\n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e saveLastSubTopic(String topic) async {\r\n    await setString(AppConstants.prefMqttLastSubTopic, topic);\r\n    await addMqttTopicHistory(topic);\r\n  }\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import 'package:flutter/material.dart';\r\nimport 'package:mqtt_client/mqtt_client.dart';\r\nimport 'package:provider/provider.dart';\r\nimport '../../models/message_data.dart';\r\nimport '../../services/mqtt_service.dart';\r\nimport '../../services/send_history_service.dart';\r\nimport '../../utils/constants.dart';\r\nimport '../../utils/data_converter.dart';\r\nimport '../../widgets/widgets.dart';\r\n\r\nclass MqttPage extends StatefulWidget {\r\n  const MqttPage({super.key});\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  State\u003cMqttPage\u003e createState() =\u003e _MqttPageState();\r\n}\r\n\r\nclass _MqttPageState extends State\u003cMqttPage\u003e\r\n    with SingleTickerProviderStateMixin {\r\n  late TabController _tabController;\r\n\r\n  // 连接配置\r\n  final _hostController = TextEditingController(text: 'broker.emqx.io');\r\n  final _portController = TextEditingController(text: '1883');\r\n  final _usernameController = TextEditingController();\r\n  final _passwordController = TextEditingController();\r\n  final _wsPathController = TextEditingController(text: '/mqtt');\r\n  bool _useWebSocket = false;\r\n  bool _useWss = false;\r\n\r\n  // 订阅配置\r\n  final _subscribeTopicController = TextEditingController(text: 'test/topic');\r\n  MqttQos _subscribeQos = MqttQos.atMostOnce;\r\n\r\n  // 发布配置\r\n  final _publishTopicController = TextEditingController(text: 'test/topic');\r\n  final _publishMessageController = TextEditingController();\r\n  MqttQos _publishQos = MqttQos.atMostOnce;\r\n  DataFormat _sendFormat = DataFormat.text;\r\n  DataFormat _receiveFormat = DataFormat.text;\r\n  CharEncoding _encoding = CharEncoding.utf8;\r\n\r\n  List\u003cString\u003e _sendHistory = [];\r\n  List\u003cString\u003e _topicHistory = [];\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  void initState() {\r\n    super.initState();\r\n    _tabController = TabController(length: 3, vsync: this);\r\n    _loadSavedConfig();\r\n    _loadSendHistory();\r\n  }\r\n",

        ],
        "originalContents": "import 'package:flutter/material.dart';\r\nimport 'package:mqtt_client/mqtt_client.dart';\r\nimport 'package:provider/provider.dart';\r\nimport '../../models/message_data.dart';\r\nimport '../../services/mqtt_service.dart';\r\nimport '../../services/send_history_service.dart';\r\nimport '../../utils/constants.dart';\r\nimport '../../utils/data_converter.dart';\r\nimport '../../widgets/widgets.dart';\r\n\r\nclass MqttPage extends StatefulWidget {\r\n  const MqttPage({super.key});\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  State\u003cMqttPage\u003e createState() =\u003e _MqttPageState();\r\n}\r\n\r\nclass _MqttPageState extends State\u003cMqttPage\u003e\r\n    with SingleTickerProviderStateMixin {\r\n  late TabController _tabController;\r\n\r\n  // 连接配置\r\n  final _hostController = TextEditingController(text: 'broker.emqx.io');\r\n  final _portController = TextEditingController(text: '1883');\r\n  final _usernameController = TextEditingController();\r\n  final _passwordController = TextEditingController();\r\n  final _wsPathController = TextEditingController(text: '/mqtt');\r\n  bool _useWebSocket = false;\r\n  bool _useWss = false;\r\n\r\n  // 订阅配置\r\n  final _subscribeTopicController = TextEditingController(text: 'test/topic');\r\n  MqttQos _subscribeQos = MqttQos.atMostOnce;\r\n\r\n  // 发布配置\r\n  final _publishTopicController = TextEditingController(text: 'test/topic');\r\n  final _publishMessageController = TextEditingController();\r\n  MqttQos _publishQos = MqttQos.atMostOnce;\r\n  DataFormat _sendFormat = DataFormat.text;\r\n  DataFormat _receiveFormat = DataFormat.text;\r\n  CharEncoding _encoding = CharEncoding.utf8;\r\n\r\n  List\u003cString\u003e _sendHistory = [];\r\n  List\u003cString\u003e _topicHistory = [];\r\n\r\n  @override\r\n  void initState() {\r\n    super.initState();\r\n    _tabController = TabController(length: 3, vsync: this);\r\n    _loadSavedConfig();\r\n    _loadSendHistory();\r\n  }\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import 'dart:typed_data';\r\n\r\n/// 消息方向\r\nenum MessageDirection {\r\n  sent, // 发送\r\n  received, // 接收\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// 数据格式\r\nenum DataFormat {\r\n  text, // 文本 (UTF-8)\r\n  hex, // 十六进制\r\n  base64, // Base64\r\n  binary, // 二进制\r\n  json, // JSON格式\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// 消息数据模型\r\nclass MessageData {\r\n  final String id;\r\n  final Uint8List data;\r\n  final MessageDirection direction;\r\n  final DateTime timestamp;\r\n  final String? source; // 消息来源（用于TCP Server显示客户端信息）\r\n  final String? topic; // MQTT主题\r\n  final int? qos; // MQTT QoS级别\r\n\r\n  MessageData({\r\n    required this.id,\r\n    required this.data,\r\n    required this.direction,\r\n    DateTime? timestamp,\r\n    this.source,\r\n    this.topic,\r\n    this.qos,\r\n  }) : timestamp = timestamp ?? DateTime.now();\r\n\r\n  /// 获取数据长度\r\n  int get length =\u003e data.length;\r\n\r\n  /// 是否为发送消息\r\n  bool get isSent =\u003e direction == MessageDirection.sent;\r\n\r\n  /// 是否为接收消息\r\n  bool get isReceived =\u003e direction == MessageDirection.received;\r\n\r\n  /// 转换为指定格式的字符串\r\n  String toFormattedString(DataFormat format) {\r\n    switch (format) {\r\n      case DataFormat.text:\r\n        try {\r\n          return String.fromCharCodes(data);\r\n        } catch (e) {\r\n          return '[无法解码为文本]';\r\n        }\r\n      case DataFormat.hex:\r\n        return data\r\n            .map((b) =\u003e b.toRadixString(16).padLeft(2, '0').toUpperCase())\r\n            .join(' ');\r\n      case DataFormat.base64:\r\n        return _toBase64(data);\r\n      case DataFormat.binary:\r\n        return data.map((b) =\u003e b.toRadixString(2).padLeft(8, '0')).join(' ');\r\n      case DataFormat.json:\r\n        try {\r\n          final text = String.fromCharCodes(data);\r\n          // 尝试解析并格式化JSON\r\n          final dynamic decoded = _parseJson(text);\r\n          return _formatJson(decoded);\r\n        } catch (e) {\r\n          return '[无效的JSON格式]';\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,

            "text": "/// 消息数据模型\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "class MessageData {\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "  final String id;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,

          {

          {

            "text": "  final String? source; // 消息来源（用于TCP Server显示客户端信息）\r"

            "text": "  final String? topic; // MQTT主题\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "  MessageData({\r"
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 46,

          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  /// 转换为指定格式的字符串\r"

            "text": "  String toFormattedString(DataFormat format) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    switch (format) {\r"

            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "      case DataFormat.text:\r"

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "            .map((b) =\u003e b.toRadixString(16).padLeft(2, '0').toUpperCase())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "            .join(' ');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "      case DataFormat.base64:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "        return _toBase64(data);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "      case DataFormat.binary:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "        return data.map((b) =\u003e b.toRadixString(2).padLeft(8, '0')).join(' ');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "      case DataFormat.json:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "        try {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "          final text = String.fromCharCodes(data);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "          // 尝试解析并格式化JSON\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "          final dynamic decoded = _parseJson(text);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "          return _formatJson(decoded);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "        } catch (e) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "          return '[无效的JSON格式]';\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "  }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "  /// 解析JSON字符串\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "  dynamic _parseJson(String text) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "import 'dart:typed_data';\r\n\r\n/// 消息方向\r\nenum MessageDirection {\r\n  sent, // 发送\r\n  received, // 接收\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// 数据格式\r\nenum DataFormat {\r\n  text, // 文本 (UTF-8)\r\n  hex, // 十六进制\r\n  base64, // Base64\r\n  binary, // 二进制\r\n  json, // JSON格式\r\n}\r\n\r\n/// 消息数据模型\r\nclass MessageData {\r\n  final String id;\r\n  final Uint8List data;\r\n  final MessageDirection direction;\r\n  final DateTime timestamp;\r\n  final String? source; // 消息来源（用于TCP Server显示客户端信息）\r\n  final String? topic; // MQTT主题\r\n  final int? qos; // MQTT QoS级别\r\n\r\n  MessageData({\r\n    required this.id,\r\n    required this.data,\r\n    required this.direction,\r\n    DateTime? timestamp,\r\n    this.source,\r\n    this.topic,\r\n    this.qos,\r\n  }) : timestamp = timestamp ?? DateTime.now();\r\n\r\n  /// 获取数据长度\r\n  int get length =\u003e data.length;\r\n\r\n  /// 是否为发送消息\r\n  bool get isSent =\u003e direction == MessageDirection.sent;\r\n\r\n  /// 是否为接收消息\r\n  bool get isReceived =\u003e direction == MessageDirection.received;\r\n\r\n  /// 转换为指定格式的字符串\r\n  String toFormattedString(DataFormat format) {\r\n    switch (format) {\r\n      case DataFormat.text:\r\n        try {\r\n          return String.fromCharCodes(data);\r\n        } catch (e) {\r\n          return '[无法解码为文本]';\r\n        }\r\n      case DataFormat.hex:\r\n        return data\r\n            .map((b) =\u003e b.toRadixString(16).padLeft(2, '0').toUpperCase())\r\n            .join(' ');\r\n      case DataFormat.base64:\r\n        return _toBase64(data);\r\n      case DataFormat.binary:\r\n        return data.map((b) =\u003e b.toRadixString(2).padLeft(8, '0')).join(' ');\r\n      case DataFormat.json:\r\n        try {\r\n          final text = String.fromCharCodes(data);\r\n          // 尝试解析并格式化JSON\r\n          final dynamic decoded = _parseJson(text);\r\n          return _formatJson(decoded);\r\n        } catch (e) {\r\n          return '[无效的JSON格式]';\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 77
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "lib/models/message_data.dart"
      },
      "score": 0.2689180374145508
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# 网络调试助手 (Network Debug Tool)\r\n\r\n一款基于 Flutter 开发的 Android 网络调试工具，支持 TCP Server、TCP Client、UDP、MQTT Client 四种通信模式，适用于嵌入式开发、物联网调试等场景。\r\n\r\n### 功能特性\r\n\r\n#### 通信模式\r\n- **TCP Server** - 支持多客户端连接（最多50个），可选择本机IP，支持单播/广播\r\n- **TCP Client** - TCP 客户端连接，支持 Ping 测试\r\n- **UDP** - UDP 通信，支持指定本地端口和目标地址\r\n- **MQTT Client** - MQTT 3.1.1 协议，支持 WebSocket/WSS，订阅/发布消息\r\n\r\n#### 数据格式\r\n- 文本 (UTF-8)\r\n- Hex (十六进制)\r\n- Base64\r\n- 二进制\r\n- JSON (自动格式化)\r\n\r\n#### 编码支持\r\n- UTF-8\r\n- GBK\r\n- GB2312  \r\n- ASCII\r\n\r\n#### 其他功能\r\n- 实时统计：发送/接收字节数、包数、连接时长\r\n- 发送历史：保存最近10条发送记录，支持持久化\r\n- MQTT配置持久化：自动保存连接参数和Topic历史\r\n- 暂停/继续接收数据\r\n- Ping 网络测试\r\n- 消息区分：发送/接收消息颜色区分，带时间戳\r\n- 自动滚动：新消息自动滚动，手动滚动时暂停\r\n\r\n### 截图\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- 可添加应用截图 --\u003e\r\n\r\n### 开发环境\r\n\r\n- Flutter SDK: ^3.10.3\r\n- Dart SDK: ^3.10.3\r\n- Android SDK: 36\r\n- 目标平台: Android\r\n\r\n### 依赖包\r\n\r\n| 包名 | 版本 | 用途 |\r\n|------|------|------|\r\n| mqtt_client | ^10.6.0 | MQTT 客户端 |\r\n| provider | ^6.1.1 | 状态管理 |\r\n| shared_preferences | ^2.2.2 | 本地存储 |\r\n| uuid | ^4.2.1 | UUID 生成 |\r\n| fast_gbk | ^1.0.0 | GBK 编码支持 |\r\n\r\n### 快速开始\r\n\r\n#### 1. 克隆项目\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\ngit clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/net_debug_tool.git\r\ncd net_debug_tool\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n#### 2. 获取依赖\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nflutter pub get\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n#### 3. 运行应用\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nflutter run\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n#### 4. 构建 APK\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nflutter build apk --release\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 使用说明\r\n\r\n#### TCP Server\r\n1. 选择本机 IP 地址和端口\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 网络调试助手 (Network Debug Tool)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "一款基于 Flutter 开发的 Android 网络调试工具，支持 TCP Server、TCP Client、UDP、MQTT Client 四种通信模式，适用于嵌入式开发、物联网调试等场景。\r"
          },

            "text": "### 功能特性\r"

            "text": "#### 通信模式\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "### 快速开始\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "#### 1. 克隆项目\r"

            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r"
          },
          {

          },
          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "#### 2. 获取依赖\r"

            "lineNumber": 65,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,

          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "#### 3. 运行应用\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r"
          },
          {

          },

          },

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "### 使用说明\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "#### TCP Server\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "1. 选择本机 IP 地址和端口\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "2. 点击\"启动服务器\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "3. 等待客户端连接\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# 网络调试助手 (Network Debug Tool)\r\n\r\n一款基于 Flutter 开发的 Android 网络调试工具，支持 TCP Server、TCP Client、UDP、MQTT Client 四种通信模式，适用于嵌入式开发、物联网调试等场景。\r\n\r\n### 功能特性\r\n\r\n#### 通信模式\r\n- **TCP Server** - 支持多客户端连接（最多50个），可选择本机IP，支持单播/广播\r\n- **TCP Client** - TCP 客户端连接，支持 Ping 测试\r\n- **UDP** - UDP 通信，支持指定本地端口和目标地址\r\n- **MQTT Client** - MQTT 3.1.1 协议，支持 WebSocket/WSS，订阅/发布消息\r\n\r\n#### 数据格式\r\n- 文本 (UTF-8)\r\n- Hex (十六进制)\r\n- Base64\r\n- 二进制\r\n- JSON (自动格式化)\r\n\r\n#### 编码支持\r\n- UTF-8\r\n- GBK\r\n- GB2312  \r\n- ASCII\r\n\r\n#### 其他功能\r\n- 实时统计：发送/接收字节数、包数、连接时长\r\n- 发送历史：保存最近10条发送记录，支持持久化\r\n- MQTT配置持久化：自动保存连接参数和Topic历史\r\n- 暂停/继续接收数据\r\n- Ping 网络测试\r\n- 消息区分：发送/接收消息颜色区分，带时间戳\r\n- 自动滚动：新消息自动滚动，手动滚动时暂停\r\n\r\n### 截图\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- 可添加应用截图 --\u003e\r\n\r\n### 开发环境\r\n\r\n- Flutter SDK: ^3.10.3\r\n- Dart SDK: ^3.10.3\r\n- Android SDK: 36\r\n- 目标平台: Android\r\n\r\n### 依赖包\r\n\r\n| 包名 | 版本 | 用途 |\r\n|------|------|------|\r\n| mqtt_client | ^10.6.0 | MQTT 客户端 |\r\n| provider | ^6.1.1 | 状态管理 |\r\n| shared_preferences | ^2.2.2 | 本地存储 |\r\n| uuid | ^4.2.1 | UUID 生成 |\r\n| fast_gbk | ^1.0.0 | GBK 编码支持 |\r\n\r\n### 快速开始\r\n\r\n#### 1. 克隆项目\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\ngit clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/net_debug_tool.git\r\ncd net_debug_tool\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n#### 2. 获取依赖\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nflutter pub get\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n#### 3. 运行应用\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nflutter run\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n#### 4. 构建 APK\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nflutter build apk --release\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 使用说明\r\n\r\n#### TCP Server\r\n1. 选择本机 IP 地址和端口\r\n",
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="create_plan">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **create_plan**</summary>


Parameters:

```json
{
  "name": "界面折叠和MQTT保活功能",
  "overview": "实现两个功能：1) 在所有通信模式页面添加参数配置区域的折叠功能，连接建立后自动折叠以腾出更多空间；2) 在MQTT页面添加Keep-Alive时间设置，支持自定义保活间隔并持久化保存。",
  "plan": "# 界面折叠和MQTT保活功能开发计划\n\n## 功能概述\n\n### 功能1：参数配置区域折叠\n- **目标**：连接建立后自动折叠参数配置区域，腾出更多空间显示通信消息\n- **范围**：TCP Client、TCP Server、UDP、MQTT 四个页面\n- **行为**：连接建立后自动折叠，用户可手动展开/折叠\n\n### 功能2：MQTT保活设置\n- **目标**：添加Keep-Alive时间输入框，支持自定义保活间隔\n- **范围**：MQTT连接配置区域\n- **行为**：用户可设置Keep-Alive值（秒），配置持久化保存\n\n## 实现方案\n\n### 1. 创建可折叠配置组件\n\n**文件**：&#96;lib/widgets/collapsible_config_card.dart&#96;（新建）\n\n创建一个通用的可折叠配置卡片组件：\n- 使用 &#96;ExpansionTile&#96; 或自定义折叠动画\n- 支持自动折叠（当 &#96;isConnected/isRunning/isActive&#96; 为 true 时）\n- 显示连接状态和简要信息在折叠状态\n- 展开时显示完整配置表单\n\n**关键特性**：\n- 折叠时显示：连接状态、服务器地址/端口（简要信息）\n- 展开时显示：完整的配置表单\n- 动画过渡效果\n\n### 2. 修改各页面使用折叠组件\n\n**文件**：\n- &#96;lib/pages/tcp_client/tcp_client_page.dart&#96;\n- &#96;lib/pages/tcp_server/tcp_server_page.dart&#96;\n- &#96;lib/pages/udp/udp_page.dart&#96;\n- &#96;lib/pages/mqtt/mqtt_page.dart&#96;\n\n**修改内容**：\n- 将现有的 &#96;_buildConnectionConfig&#96; / &#96;_buildServerConfig&#96; / &#96;_buildUdpConfig&#96; 方法改为使用新的 &#96;CollapsibleConfigCard&#96;\n- 连接建立后自动折叠（&#96;initiallyExpanded: !service.isConnected&#96;）\n- 保持原有的所有功能和验证逻辑\n\n### 3. MQTT保活设置\n\n**文件**：&#96;lib/pages/mqtt/mqtt_page.dart&#96;\n\n**修改内容**：\n- 在连接配置区域添加Keep-Alive输入框\n- 添加 &#96;_keepAliveController&#96; 控制器\n- 默认值：60秒（使用 &#96;AppConstants.mqttKeepAlive&#96;）\n- 连接时传递keep-alive值到 &#96;MqttService.connect()&#96;\n\n**文件**：&#96;lib/services/send_history_service.dart&#96;\n\n**修改内容**：\n- 添加 &#96;prefMqttKeepAlive&#96; 常量键\n- 添加 &#96;saveMqttKeepAlive(int keepAlive)&#96; 方法\n- 添加 &#96;getMqttKeepAlive()&#96; 方法（默认返回60）\n- 在 &#96;saveMqttConfig()&#96; 中保存keep-alive值\n- 在 &#96;getMqttConfig()&#96; 中读取keep-alive值\n\n**文件**：&#96;lib/services/mqtt_service.dart&#96;\n\n**修改内容**：\n- 确保 &#96;connect()&#96; 方法正确使用传入的 &#96;keepAlive&#96; 参数\n- 添加 &#96;keepAlive&#96; getter 以便UI显示当前值\n\n### 4. 更新常量定义\n\n**文件**：&#96;lib/utils/constants.dart&#96;\n\n**修改内容**：\n- 添加 &#96;prefMqttKeepAlive&#96; 键常量\n\n## 实现细节\n\n### 折叠组件设计\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;dart\nclass CollapsibleConfigCard extends StatefulWidget {\n  final Widget title; // 折叠时显示的标题\n  final Widget expandedContent; // 展开时的内容\n  final bool initiallyExpanded; // 初始是否展开\n  final bool isConnected; // 是否已连接（用于自动折叠）\n  \n  // ... 其他属性\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**折叠状态显示**：\n- TCP Client: \"已连接: {host}:{port}\" 或 \"未连接\"\n- TCP Server: \"服务器运行中: {ip}:{port}\" 或 \"服务器已停止\"\n- UDP: \"UDP已启动: 本地端口 {port}\" 或 \"UDP未启动\"\n- MQTT: \"已连接: {host}:{port}\" 或 \"未连接\"\n\n### Keep-Alive输入框\n\n- 位置：MQTT连接配置区域，在用户名/密码下方\n- 类型：数字输入框（&#96;TextInputType.number&#96;）\n- 验证：范围 10-65535 秒（MQTT协议要求）\n- 默认值：60秒\n- 连接时禁用输入框\n\n### 数据持久化\n\n- Keep-Alive值保存在 &#96;SharedPreferences&#96;\n- 与MQTT其他配置一起保存/加载\n- 应用重启后恢复上次设置的值\n\n## 测试要点\n\n1. **折叠功能**：\n   - 连接建立后自动折叠\n   - 手动展开/折叠功能正常\n   - 折叠状态下显示关键信息\n   - 各页面折叠功能独立工作\n\n2. **MQTT保活**：\n   - Keep-Alive值正确传递到服务层\n   - 配置持久化保存和恢复\n   - 输入验证（范围、格式）\n   - 连接时禁用输入框\n\n3. **兼容性**：\n   - 不影响现有功能\n   - 向后兼容（未设置keep-alive时使用默认值）\n   - UI布局在不同屏幕尺寸下正常显示\n\n## 文件清单\n\n### 新建文件\n- &#96;lib/widgets/collapsible_config_card.dart&#96;\n\n### 修改文件\n- &#96;lib/pages/tcp_client/tcp_client_page.dart&#96;\n- &#96;lib/pages/tcp_server/tcp_server_page.dart&#96;\n- &#96;lib/pages/udp/udp_page.dart&#96;\n- &#96;lib/pages/mqtt/mqtt_page.dart&#96;\n- &#96;lib/services/mqtt_service.dart&#96;\n- &#96;lib/services/send_history_service.dart&#96;\n- &#96;lib/utils/constants.dart&#96;\n- &#96;lib/widgets/widgets.dart&#96;（导出新组件）",
  "todos": [
    {
      "content": "创建 CollapsibleConfigCard 组件，支持自动折叠和手动展开/折叠功能",
      "id": "create_collapsible_widget",
      "status": "pending"
    },
```

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 183, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,183 @@
- 
+ import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
+ 
+ /// 可折叠配置卡片组件
+ /// 连接建立后自动折叠，用户可手动展开/折叠
+ class CollapsibleConfigCard extends StatefulWidget {
+   /// 折叠时显示的摘要信息
+   final String collapsedSummary;
+ 
+   /// 是否已连接（用于自动折叠）
+   final bool isConnected;
+ 
+   /// 连接状态文本
+   final String statusText;
+ 
+   /// 展开时的内容
+   final Widget expandedContent;
+ 
+   /// 连接按钮区域（始终显示）
+   final Widget? actionButtons;
+ 
+   const CollapsibleConfigCard({
+     super.key,
+     required this.collapsedSummary,
+     required this.isConnected,
+     required this.statusText,
+     required this.expandedContent,
+     this.actionButtons,
+   });
+ 
+   @override
+   State&lt;CollapsibleConfigCard&gt; createState() =&gt; _CollapsibleConfigCardState();
+ }
+ 
+ class _CollapsibleConfigCardState extends State&lt;CollapsibleConfigCard&gt;
+     with SingleTickerProviderStateMixin {
+   late bool _isExpanded;
+   late AnimationController _animationController;
+   late Animation&lt;double&gt; _animation;
+ 
+   @override
+   void initState() {
+     super.initState();
+     // 初始状态：未连接时展开，已连接时折叠
+     _isExpanded = !widget.isConnected;
+     _animationController = AnimationController(
+       duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 200),
+       vsync: this,
+     );
+     _animation = CurvedAnimation(
+       parent: _animationController,
+       curve: Curves.easeInOut,
+     );
+ 
+     if (_isExpanded) {
+       _animationController.value = 1.0;
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   @override
+   void didUpdateWidget(covariant CollapsibleConfigCard oldWidget) {
+     super.didUpdateWidget(oldWidget);
+ 
+     // 连接状态变化时自动折叠/展开
+     if (widget.isConnected != oldWidget.isConnected) {
+       if (widget.isConnected &amp;&amp; _isExpanded) {
+         // 连接成功后自动折叠
+         _collapse();
+       }
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   @override
+   void dispose() {
+     _animationController.dispose();
+     super.dispose();
+   }
+ 
+   void _toggle() {
+     setState(() {
+       _isExpanded = !_isExpanded;
+       if (_isExpanded) {
+         _animationController.forward();
+       } else {
+         _animationController.reverse();
+       }
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   void _collapse() {
+     setState(() {
+       _isExpanded = false;
+       _animationController.reverse();
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   @override
+   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
+     final theme = Theme.of(context);
+     final statusColor = widget.isConnected ? Colors.green : Colors.grey;
+ 
+     return Card(
+       margin: const EdgeInsets.all(8),
+       child: Column(
+         mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
+         children: [
+           // 标题栏（始终显示）
+           InkWell(
+             onTap: _toggle,
+             borderRadius: const BorderRadius.vertical(top: Radius.circular(12)),
+             child: Padding(
+               padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 8),
+               child: Row(
+                 children: [
+                   // 连接状态指示器
+                   Container(
+                     width: 10,
+                     height: 10,
+                     decoration: BoxDecoration(
+                       color: statusColor,
+                       shape: BoxShape.circle,
+                     ),
+                   ),
+                   const SizedBox(width: 8),
+                   // 状态/摘要信息
+                   Expanded(
+                     child: Column(
+                       crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
+                       children: [
+                         Text(
+                           widget.statusText,
+                           style: TextStyle(
+                             fontSize: 14,
+                             fontWeight: FontWeight.w500,
+                             color: statusColor,
+                           ),
+                         ),
+                         if (!_isExpanded &amp;&amp; widget.collapsedSummary.isNotEmpty)
+                           Text(
+                             widget.collapsedSummary,
+                             style: TextStyle(
+                               fontSize: 12,
+                               color: theme.hintColor,
+                             ),
+                             maxLines: 1,
+                             overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
+                           ),
+                       ],
+                     ),
+                   ),
+                   // 展开/折叠图标
+                   AnimatedRotation(
+                     turns: _isExpanded ? 0.5 : 0,
+                     duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 200),
+                     child: Icon(
+                       Icons.expand_more,
+                       color: theme.hintColor,
+                     ),
+                   ),
+                 ],
+               ),
+             ),
+           ),
+           // 可折叠的配置内容
+           SizeTransition(
+             sizeFactor: _animation,
+             axisAlignment: -1.0,
+             child: Padding(
+               padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(12, 0, 12, 8),
+               child: widget.expandedContent,
+             ),
+           ),
+           // 操作按钮区域（始终显示）
+           if (widget.actionButtons != null)
+             Padding(
+               padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(12, 0, 12, 12),
+               child: widget.actionButtons!,
+             ),
+         ],
+       ),
+     );
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
+                         });
+                       },
+               ),
+               const Text('WSS'),
+               const SizedBox(width: 8),
+               if (_useWebSocket)

+                   child: TextField(

+                     labelText: '密码（可选）',

+                     border: OutlineInputBorder(),

+                   keyboardType: TextInputType.number,

+             tooltip: service.isPaused ? '继续接收' : '暂停接收',
```

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

应用已成功构建并运行。构建过程显示 Windows 应用程序已成功创建（exit code 0）。"Lost connection to device" 可能是因为应用窗口被关闭或设备连接问题，但这不影响我们的开发工作。

让我总结一下完成的所有工作：

所有任务已完成！以下是实现的功能摘要：

## 完成的功能

### 功能1：参数配置区域折叠

1. **创建了 `CollapsibleConfigCard` 组件** (`lib/widgets/collapsible_config_card.dart`)
   - 支持自动折叠（连接建立后自动折叠）
   - 支持手动展开/折叠（点击标题栏）
   - 折叠时显示连接状态和关键信息摘要
   - 动画过渡效果

2. **更新了所有通信页面**：
   - **TCP Client**: 显示 "已连接: host:port" 或 "未连接"
   - **TCP Server**: 显示 "服务器运行中: ip:port (N个客户端)" 或 "服务器已停止"  
   - **UDP**: 显示 "UDP已启动: 本地:port → host:port" 或 "UDP未启动"
   - **MQTT**: 显示 "已连接: host:port" 或 "未连接"

### 功能2：MQTT保活设置

1. **添加了 Keep-Alive 输入框**
   - 位置：MQTT连接配置区域，在用户名/密码下方
   - 类型：数字输入框
   - 验证：范围 10-65535 秒
   - 默认值：60秒
   - 连接时禁用输入框

2. **持久化保存**
   - Keep-Alive 值保存在 `SharedPreferences`
   - 应用重启后恢复上次设置的值
   - 与其他 MQTT 配置一起保存/加载

3. **服务层支持**
   - `MqttService` 添加了 `keepAlive` getter
   - 连接时正确传递 keep-alive 参数

## 修改的文件

### 新建文件
- `lib/widgets/collapsible_config_card.dart`

### 修改文件
- `lib/widgets/widgets.dart` - 导出新组件
- `lib/utils/constants.dart` - 添加 `prefMqttKeepAlive` 常量
- `lib/services/send_history_service.dart` - 添加 keep-alive 保存/读取
- `lib/services/mqtt_service.dart` - 添加 `keepAlive` getter
- `lib/pages/tcp_client/tcp_client_page.dart` - 使用折叠组件
- `lib/pages/tcp_server/tcp_server_page.dart` - 使用折叠组件
- `lib/pages/udp/udp_page.dart` - 使用折叠组件
- `lib/pages/mqtt/mqtt_page.dart` - 使用折叠组件 + Keep-Alive 输入框

---

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

winget 需要交互确认。提供手动安装步骤：

## 安装 JDK 并配置环境变量

### 步骤 1：下载并安装 JDK

推荐使用 Microsoft OpenJDK 17（与 Android 兼容）：

1. 访问下载页面：
   - 直接下载：https://learn.microsoft.com/zh-cn/java/openjdk/download#openjdk-17
   - 或使用：https://adoptium.net/zh-CN/temurin/releases/?version=17

2. 下载 Windows x64 安装程序（.msi）

3. 运行安装程序，安装到默认位置（通常是 `C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.x.x`）

### 步骤 2：设置环境变量

安装完成后，设置 JAVA_HOME：

**方法 A：使用 PowerShell（临时，仅当前会话）**

```powershell
# 设置 JAVA_HOME（替换为你的实际 JDK 路径）
$env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.0.13"
$env:PATH = "$env:JAVA_HOME\bin;$env:PATH"
```

**方法 B：永久设置（推荐）**

1. 按 `Win + R`，输入 `sysdm.cpl`，回车
2. 打开“高级”选项卡
3. 点击“环境变量”
4. 在“系统变量”中：
   - 新建变量名：`JAVA_HOME`
   - 变量值：`C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.0.13`（替换为实际路径）
5. 编辑 `Path` 变量，添加：`%JAVA_HOME%\bin`
6. 确定保存

### 步骤 3：验证安装

安装并设置后，重新打开 PowerShell 或 CMD，运行：

```powershell
java -version
```

应看到类似输出：
```
openjdk version "17.0.x" ...
```

### 步骤 4：重新打包 APK

设置完成后，重新运行打包命令：

```powershell
flutter build apk --release
```

---

## 快速方案（如果已安装 Android Studio）

如果已安装 Android Studio，通常自带 JDK。查找路径：

1. 打开 Android Studio
2. 进入 `File` → `Settings` → `Build, Execution, Deployment` → `Build Tools` → `Gradle`
3. 查看 `Gradle JDK` 路径
4. 将该路径设置为 `JAVA_HOME`

或者查找常见位置：
- `C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr`
- `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Android\Android Studio\jbr`

安装完成后告诉我，我可以帮你验证配置是否正确。
